transition-colors\"\n>\n  {/* qui rimane il resto della card: numero, nome, ruolo, rating live */}\n</div>\nPoi, in basso a destra o in una colonna laterale del layout Scouting, aggiungi un blocco come:\n\ntsx\nCopia codice\n{selectedPlayerForStats && (\n  <aside className=\"mt-4 md:mt-0 md:w-80 bg-cream-dark border-2 border-black rounded-card shadow-cartoon p-4\">\n    <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\n      <div>\n        <div className=\"text-xs font-soft uppercase text-terracotta\">Giocatore</div>\n        <div className=\"font-title text-2xl\">\n          {selectedPlayerForStats.firstName} {selectedPlayerForStats.lastName}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      {/* rating live se disponibile */}\n      <div className=\"bg-lime border-2 border-black rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-center\">\n        <div className=\"text-[10px] font-soft uppercase\">Rating live</div>\n        <div className=\"font-title text-2xl\">\n          {liveRatings[selectedPlayerForStats.id]?.rating?.toFixed(1) ?? '6.5'}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    {(() => {\n      const stats = livePlayerStats[selectedPlayerForStats.id];\n      if (!stats) {\n        return <div className=\"text-sm font-soft text-black/60\">Nessun dato registrato per questo giocatore.</div>;\n      }\n\n      const attackEff =\n        stats.attacks > 0 ? Math.round(((stats.attackPoints - stats.attackErrors - stats.attackBlocked) / stats.attacks) * 100) : 0;\n      const receptionEff =\n        stats.receptions > 0 ? Math.round((stats.perfectReceptions + stats.positiveReceptions) / stats.receptions * 100) : 0;\n      const serveEff =\n        stats.serves > 0 ? Math.round((stats.aces - stats.serveErrors) / stats.serves * 100) : 0;\n\n      return (\n        <div className=\"space-y-3 text-sm font-soft\">\n          <div>\n            <div className=\"font-bold uppercase mb-1\">Attacco</div>\n            <div>Attacchi: {stats.attacks}</div>\n            <div>Punti: {stats.attackPoints}</div>\n            <div>Errori: {stats.attackErrors} (murato {stats.attackBlocked})</div>\n            <div>Efficienza stimata: {attackEff}%</div>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div className=\"font-bold uppercase mb-1\">Battuta</div>\n            <div>Servizi: {stats.serves}</div>\n            <div>Ace: {stats.aces}</div>\n            <div>Errori: {stats.serveErrors}</div>\n            <div>Impatto: {serveEff}%</div>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div className=\"font-bold uppercase mb-1\">Ricezione</div>\n            <div>Ricezioni: {stats.receptions}</div>\n            <div>Perfette/Positive: {stats.perfectReceptions + stats.positiveReceptions}</div>\n            <div>Negative/Ace subiti: {stats.negativeReceptions + stats.acesConceded}</div>\n React.FC<{ label: string; value: number; total?: number }> = ({ label, value, total }) => {\n  const pct = total && total > 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between text-xs mb-1\">\n        <span>{label}</span>\n        <span>\n          {value}\n          {total ? ` (${pct}%)` : ''}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"h-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-black/10 overflow-hidden\">\n        <div\n          className=\"h-full bg-teal\"\n          style={{ width: `${Math.min(pct, 100)}%` }}\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\nTIMELINE DEL SET (pallina + punteggio come nello screenshot di riferimento):\n\nSotto la card analytics, aggiungi:\n\ntsx\nCopia codice\n{rallyTimeline.length > 0 && (\n  <section className=\"mt-6 bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-card p-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto\">\n    <div className=\"font-title text-xl mb-2 uppercase\">Andamento set</div>\n    <div className=\"space-y-1 text-xs font-soft\">\n      {rallyTimeline.map((rally) => (\n        <div\n          key={rally.id}\n          className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-2 py-1 rounded-full bg-cream-dark\"\n        >\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <span>🏐</span>\n            <span>\n              {rally.teamPointsAfter} - {rally.opponentPointsAfter}\n            </span>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <span className={rally.scoringSide === 'us' ? ---\n\nexport interface PlayerLiveStats {\n  playerId: string;\n  matchId: string;\n  attacks: number;\n  attackPoints: number;\n  attackErrors: number;\n  attackBlocked: number;\n\n  serves: number;\n  aces: number;\n  serveErrors: number;\n\n  receptions: number;\n  perfectReceptions: number;\n  positiveReceptions: number;\n  negativeReceptions: number;\n  acesConceded: number;\n\n  blocks: number;\n  blockPoints: number;\n  blockTouches: number;\n  blockErrors: number;\n\n  digs: number;\n  digErrors: number;\n}\n\nexport interface TeamMatchStats {\n  matchId: string;\n  teamId: string;\n  totalPoints: number;\n  pointsFromServe: number;\n  pointsFromReception: number; // Not always explicitly tracked in this model, but kept for interface consistency\n  pointsFromBlock: number;\n  pointsFromAttack: number;\n  aces: number;\n  serveErrors: number;\n  receptionErrors: number;\n  attackErrors: number;\n  blockErrors: number;\n}\n\nexport interface RallyEntry {\n  id: string;\n  setNumber: number;\n  sequence: number; // progressivo nel set\n  teamPointsAfter: number;\n  opponentPointsAfter: number;\n  scoringSide: 'us' | 'them';\n  scoringPlayerId?: string; // se il punto è “nostro” e associato a un giocatore\n  fundamental?: Fundamental;\n  outcomeCode?: string;\n}\n```\n\n## lib/statsHelpers.ts\n\nNew helper file to calculate derived statistics from the raw event stream.\n\n```typescript\nimport { GameEvent, PlayerLiveStats, TeamMatchStats, RallyEntry, Fundamental } from '../types';\n\nexport function aggregatePlayerStats(events: GameEvent[], matchId: string): Record<string, PlayerLiveStats> {\n  const statsByPlayer: Record<string, PlayerLiveStats> = {};\n\n  const ensure = (playerId: string): PlayerLiveStats => {\n    if (!statsByPlayer[playerId]) {\n      statsByPlayer[playerId] = {\n        playerId,\n        matchId,\n        attacks: 0,\n        attackPoints: 0,\n        attackErrors: 0,\n        attackBlocked: 0,\n        serves: 0,\n        aces: 0,\n        serveErrors: 0,\n        receptions: 0,\n        perfectReceptions: 0,\n        positiveReceptions: 0,\n        negativeReceptions: 0,\n        acesConceded: 0,\n        blocks: 0,\n        blockPoints: 0,\n        blockTouches: 0,\n        blockErrors: 0,\n        digs: 0,\n        digErrors: 0,\n      };\n    }\n    return statsByPlayer[playerId];\n  };\n\n  for (const ev of events) {\n    const s = ensure(ev.playerId);\n\n    switch (ev.fundamental) {\n      case Fundamental.ATTACK:\n        s.attacks++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'attack_point') s.attackPoints++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'attack_error') s.attackErrors++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'attack_blocked') s.attackBlocked++;\n        break;\n\n      case Fundamental.SERVE:\n        s.serves++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'serve_ace') s.aces++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'serve_error') s.serveErrors++;\n        break;\n\n      case Fundamental.RECEPTION:\n        s.receptions++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'reception_perfect') s.perfectReceptions++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'reception_positive') s.positiveReceptions++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'reception_negative') s.negativeReceptions++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'reception_ace_conceded') s.acesConceded++;\n        break;\n\n      case Fundamental.BLOCK:\n        s.blocks++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'block_point') s.blockPoints++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'block_touch') s.blockTouches++;\n        if (ev.outcome === 'block_late_miss') s.blockErrors++;\n        break;\n\n      case Fundamental.DEFENSE:\n        if (ev.outcome === 'defense_great' || ev.outcome === 'defense_ok') {\n          s.digs++;\n        }\n        if (ev.outcome === 'defense_error') {\n          s.digErrors++;\n        }\n        break;\n\n      default:\n        break;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return statsByPlayer;\n}\n\nexport function aggregateTeamStats(events: GameEvent[], matchId: string, teamId: string): TeamMatchStats {\n  let totalPoints = 0;\n  let pointsFromServe = 0;\n  let pointsFromReception = 0;\n  let pointsFromBlock = 0;\n  let pointsFromAttack = 0;\n  let aces = 0;\n  let serveErrors = 0;\n  let receptionErrors = 0;\n  let attackErrors = 0;\n  let blockErrors = 0;\n\n  for (const ev of events) {\n    // In a real app we'd check ev.teamId, but in mock our events are mostly for our team\n    // unless explicitly marked otherwise. Here we assume events track \"our\" players.\n\n    if (ev.fundamental === Fundamental.SERVE) {\n      if (ev.outcome === 'serve_ace') {\n        totalPoints++;\n        pointsFromServe++;\n        aces++;\n      }\n      if (ev.outcome === 'serve_error') {\n        serveErrors++;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (ev.fundamental === Fundamental.ATTACK) {\n      if (ev.outcome === 'attack_point') {\n        totalPoints++;\n        pointsFromAttack++;\n      }\n      if (ev.outcome === 'attack_error' || ev.outcome === 'attack_blocked') {\n        attackErrors++;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (ev.fundamental === Fundamental.RECEPTION) {\n      if (ev.outcome === 'reception_negative' || ev.outcome === 'reception_ace_conceded') {\n        receptionErrors++;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (ev.fundamental === Fundamental.BLOCK) {\n      if (ev.outcome === 'block_point') {\n        totalPoints++;\n        pointsFromBlock++;\n      }\n      if (ev.outcome === 'block_late_miss') {\n        blockErrors++;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    matchId,\n    teamId,\n    totalPoints,\n    pointsFromServe,\n    pointsFromReception,\n    pointsFromBlock,\n    pointsFromAttack,\n    aces,\n    serveErrors,\n    receptionErrors,\n    attackErrors,\n    blockErrors,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Builds a chronological timeline of rallies.\n */\nexport function buildRallyTimeline(\n  events: GameEvent[],\n  matchId: string,\n  options: {\n    startingSetNumber: number;\n    teamId: string;\n    scoreByPoint: (ev: GameEvent) => { scoringSide: 'us' | 'them' } | null;\n  }\n): RallyEntry[] {\n  // Sort events by timestamp\n  const sortedEvents = [...events].sort((a, b) => a.timestamp - b.timestamp);\n  \n  const timeline: RallyEntry[] = [];\n  // For the timeline, we only care about the CURRENT set usually, or we list all.\n  // The prompt implies \"timeline del set\". Let's filter by current set.\n  const setEvents = sortedEvents.filter(e => e.setNumber === options.startingSetNumber);\n\n  let teamPoints = 0;\n  let oppPoints = 0;\n  let sequence = 0;\n\n  for (const ev of setEvents) {\n    const scoring = options.scoreByPoint(ev);\n    if (!scoring) continue;\n\n    if (scoring.scoringSide === 'us') {\n      teamPoints++;\n    } else {\n      oppPoints++;\n    }\n\n    sequence++;\n\n    timeline.push({\n      id: `${matchId}-${options.startingSetNumber}-${sequence}-${ev.id}`,\n      setNumber: options.startingSetNumber,\n      sequence,\n      teamPointsAfter: teamPoints,\n      opponentPointsAfter: oppPoints,\n      scoringSide: scoring.scoringSide,\n      scoringPlayerId: ev.playerId,\n      fundamental: ev.fundamental,\n      outcomeCode: ev.outcome,\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Reverse to show newest on top\n  return timeline.reverse();\n}\n```\n\n## pages/Scouting.tsx\n\nMajor update to include the Stats/Analytics features.\n\n```tsx\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { Match, Player, Fundamental, OutcomeCode, GameEvent, User, UserRole, MatchLineup, CourtPosition, PlayerPosition, RotationImpact, SetScore, PlayerLiveStats, TeamMatchStats, RallyEntry } from '../types';\nimport { getMatches, getTeamPlayers, saveMatchEvents, saveEvent, getInitialLineupForMatch } from '../services/mockService';\nimport { computeLiveRatingsForMatch } from '../lib/liveRating';\nimport { aggregatePlayerStats, aggregateTeamStats, buildRallyTimeline } from '../lib/statsHelpers';\nimport { Button } from '../components/ui/Buttons';\n\ninterface ScoutingProps {\n  matchId: string;\n  user: User;\n  onFinished: () => void;\n  showToast: (type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info', title: string, message?: string) => void;\n}\n\n// --- CONFIGURATION ---\n\ntype OutcomeConfig = {\n  code: OutcomeCode;\n  label: string;\n  symbol: string; // e.g., \"+\", \"++\", \"-\", \"--\"\n  rotationImpact: RotationImpact;\n};\n\ntype FundamentalConfig = {\n  label: string;\n  outcomes: OutcomeConfig[];\n};\n\nconst FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG: Record<Fundamental, FundamentalConfig> = {\n  attack: {\n    label: 'Attacco',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'attack_point',   label: 'Punto',    symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'attack_blocked', label: 'Murato',   symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'attack_error',   label: 'Errore',   symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'attack_defended',label: 'Difeso',   symbol: '0',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n    ],\n  },\n  reception: {\n    label: 'Ricezione',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'reception_perfect',         label: 'Perfetta', symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'reception_positive',        label: 'Positiva', symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'reception_negative',        label: 'Negativa', symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'reception_ace_conceded',    label: 'Ace subito', symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  serve: {\n    label: 'Battuta',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'serve_ace',          label: 'Ace',             symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'serve_good_pressure',label: 'Forzata',         symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' }, // Giving point_for_us for forced errors isn't strictly automatic but close enough for MVP logic\n      { code: 'serve_in_play',      label: 'In gioco',        symbol: '0',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'serve_error',        label: 'Errore',          symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  block: {\n    label: 'Muro',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'block_point',   label: 'Muro punto', symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'block_touch',   label: 'Tocco',      symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'block_late_miss', label: 'Fuori tempo', symbol: '-', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  defense: {\n    label: 'Difesa',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'defense_great', label: 'Difesa top', symbol: '+', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'defense_ok',    label: 'Difesa ok',  symbol: '0', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'defense_error', label: 'Errore',     symbol: '-', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  error_other: {\n    label: 'Errori',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'net_fault',      label: 'Fallo rete',      symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'rotation_fault', label: 'Fallo rotazione', symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'card_yellow',    label: 'Giallo',          symbol: 'Y',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'card_red',       label: 'Rosso',           symbol: 'R',  rotationImpact: 'card_red' },\n    ],\n  },\n};\n\n// --- HELPERS ---\n\nconst getRoleInitial = (position: PlayerPosition): string => {\n  switch (position) {\n    case PlayerPosition.SETTER: return 'S';\n    case PlayerPosition.OPPOSITE: return 'O';\n    case PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER: return 'OH';\n    case PlayerPosition.MIDDLE_BLOCKER: return 'MB';\n    case PlayerPosition.LIBERO: return 'L';\n    default: return '?';\n  }\n};\n\nconst getOutcomeColor = (code: OutcomeCode) => {\n    if (code.includes('point') || code.includes('ace') || code.includes('perfect') || code.includes('great')) return 'bg-lime text-black border-black';\n    if (code.includes('error') || code.includes('fault') || code.includes('conceded')) return 'bg-terracotta text-cream border-black';\n    return 'bg-cream-dark text-black border-black';\n};\n\nconst rotateLineupLogic = (currentLineup: MatchLineup): MatchLineup => {\n    const nextPosMap: Record<number, CourtPosition> = {\n        1: 6, 6: 5, 5: 4, 4: 3, 3: 2, 2: 1\n    };\n    const nextOnCourt = currentLineup.onCourt.map(slot => ({\n        ...slot,\n        position: nextPosMap[slot.position]\n    }));\n    return {\n        ...currentLineup,\n        onCourt: nextOnCourt,\n        rotationIndex: currentLineup.rotationIndex + 1\n    };\n};\n\nconst isSetOver = (setNumber: number, teamPts: number, oppPts: number): { finished: boolean; winner: 'us' | 'them' | null } => {\n  const target = setNumber === 5 ? 15 : 25;\n  if (teamPts >= target || oppPts >= target) {\n    const diff = Math.abs(teamPts - oppPts);\n    if (diff >= 2) {\n      if (teamPts > oppPts) return { finished: true, winner: 'us' };\n      if (oppPts > teamPts) return { finished: true, winner: 'them' };\n    }\n  }\n  return { finished: false, winner: null };\n};\n\n// Internal Component for Analytics Bars\nconst StatBar: React.FC<{ label: string; value: number; total?: number }> = ({ label, value, total }) => {\n  const pct = total && total > 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between text-xs mb-1 font-bold\">\n        <span>{label}</span>\n        <span>{value} <span className=\"text-gray-400 font-normal\">({pct}%)</span></span>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"h-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-black/10 overflow-hidden\">\n        <div\n          className=\"h-full bg-teal\"\n          style={{ width: `${Math.min(pct, 100)}%` }}\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport const Scouting: React.FC<ScoutingProps> = ({ matchId, user, onFinished, showToast }) => {\n  // Data State\n  const [match, setMatch] = useState<Match | null>(null);\n  const [players, setPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);\n  const [lineup, setLineup] = useState<MatchLineup | null>(null);\n  const [events, setEvents] = useState<GameEvent[]>([]);\n  \n  // UI State\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Stats State\n  const [livePlayerStats, setLivePlayerStats] = useState<Record<string, PlayerLiveStats>>({});\n  const [teamMatchStats, setTeamMatchStats] = useState<TeamMatchStats | null>(null);\n  const [rallyTimeline, setRallyTimeline] = useState<RallyEntry[]>([]);\n  const [selectedPlayerForStats, setSelectedPlayerForStats] = useState<Player | null>(null);\n\n  // Game Score State\n  const [currentSet, setCurrentSet] = useState(1);\n  const [teamPoints, setTeamPoints] = useState(0);\n  const [opponentPoints, setOpponentPoints] = useState(0);\n  const [setScores, setSetScores] = useState<SetScore[]>([\n    { setNumber: 1, teamPoints: 0, opponentPoints: 0, isFinished: false },\n  ]);\n  const [setsWonUs, setSetsWonUs] = useState<number>(0);\n  const [setsWonThem, setSetsWonThem] = useState<number>(0);\n  \n  const [rotationIndex, setRotationIndex] = useState(0);\n  const [hasRotatedInCurrentRun, setHasRotatedInCurrentRun] = useState<boolean>(false);\n\n  // Interaction State\n  const [selectedPlayerId, setSelectedPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [selectedFundamental, setSelectedFundamental] = useState<Fundamental | null>(null);\n  const [selectedOutcome, setSelectedOutcome] = useState<OutcomeCode | null>(null);\n  const [isImportant, setIsImportant] = useState(false);\n  const [isDecisive, setIsDecisive] = useState(false);\n\n  const [isSubMode, setIsSubMode] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedBenchPlayerId, setSelectedBenchPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // --- DERIVED STATE ---\n  \n  const playersById = useMemo(() => {\n      const map: Record<string, { position: PlayerPosition, data: Player }> = {};\n      players.forEach(p => map[p.id] = { position: p.position, data: p });\n      return map;\n  }, [players]);\n\n  const liveRatings = useMemo(() => {\n      return computeLiveRatingsForMatch(events, playersById);\n  }, [events, playersById]);\n\n  // --- HELPERS FOR STATS ---\n\n  const recomputeDerivedData = (updatedEvents: GameEvent[], currentSetNum: number) => {\n      if (!match) return;\n      const ourTeamId = match.teamId;\n\n      // 1. Player Stats\n      const pStats = aggregatePlayerStats(updatedEvents, match.id);\n      setLivePlayerStats(pStats);\n\n      // 2. Team Stats\n      const tStats = aggregateTeamStats(updatedEvents, match.id, ourTeamId);\n      setTeamMatchStats(tStats);\n\n      // 3. Timeline\n      const timeline = buildRallyTimeline(updatedEvents, match.id, {\n          startingSetNumber: currentSetNum,\n          teamId: ourTeamId,\n          scoreByPoint: (ev: GameEvent) => {\n              const fundConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[ev.fundamental];\n              const outcomeConfig = fundConfig?.outcomes.find(o => o.code === ev.outcome);\n              if (!outcomeConfig) return null;\n              \n              if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_us') return { scoringSide: 'us' };\n              if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_them' || outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'card_red') return { scoringSide: 'them' };\n              return null;\n          }\n      });\n      setRallyTimeline(timeline);\n  };\n\n  // --- INITIALIZATION ---\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const init = async () => {\n       try {\n           const [matches, teamPlayers, initialLineup] = await Promise.all([\n               getMatches('t1'),\n               getTeamPlayers('t1'),\n               getInitialLineupForMatch(matchId)\n           ]);\n           \n           const m = matches.find(x => x.id === matchId);\n           setMatch(m || null);\n           setPlayers(teamPlayers);\n           setLineup(initialLineup);\n\n       } catch (error) {\n           showToast('error', 'Load Failed', 'Could not load match data.');\n       } finally {\n           setLoading(false);\n       }\n    };\n    init();\n  }, [matchId]); \n\n  // Auto-context logic\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const criticalScore = 20;\n    const isEndGame = teamPoints >= criticalScore || opponentPoints >= criticalScore;\n    setIsImportant(isEndGame);\n    const isSetPoint = (teamPoints >= 24 || opponentPoints >= 24) && Math.abs(teamPoints - opponentPoints) >= 1;\n    setIsDecisive(isSetPoint);\n  }, [teamPoints, opponentPoints]);\n\n\n  // --- SET MANAGEMENT LOGIC ---\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const { finished, winner } = isSetOver(currentSet, teamPoints, opponentPoints);\n\n    setSetScores((prev) => {\n        const existingIndex = prev.findIndex((s) => s.setNumber === currentSet);\n        const updated: SetScore = {\n          setNumber: currentSet,\n          teamPoints: teamPoints,\n          opponentPoints: opponentPoints,\n          isFinished: finished,\n        };\n        if (existingIndex >= 0) {\n          const clone = [...prev];\n          clone[existingIndex] = updated;\n          return clone;\n        }\n        return [...prev, updated];\n    });\n\n    if (finished) {\n      showToast('success', `Set ${currentSet} Finished!`, `Winner: ${winner === 'us' ? 'Us' : 'Them'}`);\n\n      if (winner === 'us') setSetsWonUs((prev) => prev + 1);\n      else if (winner === 'them') setSetsWonThem((prev) => prev + 1);\n\n      if (currentSet < 5) {\n        const nextSetNumber = currentSet + 1;\n        setTeamPoints(0);\n        setOpponentPoints(0);\n        setCurrentSet(nextSetNumber);\n        \n        setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false);\n        if (lineup) {\n            setLineup(prev => prev ? ({ ...prev, rotationIndex: 0 }) : null);\n            setRotationIndex(0);\n        }\n\n        setSetScores((prev) => [\n            ...prev,\n            { setNumber: nextSetNumber, teamPoints: 0, opponentPoints: 0, isFinished: false }\n        ]);\n        \n        // Reset timeline for new set\n        setRallyTimeline([]);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [teamPoints, opponentPoints, currentSet]);\n\n\n  // --- HANDLERS ---\n\n  const handleManualRotate = () => {\n      if (!lineup) return;\n      const nextLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n      setLineup(nextLineup);\n      setRotationIndex(nextLineup.rotationIndex);\n      setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false); \n      showToast('info', 'Rotated', 'Manual rotation completed.');\n  };\n\n  const handleSubSelectBench = (playerId: string) => {\n      setIsSubMode(true);\n      setSelectedBenchPlayerId(playerId);\n      showToast('info', 'Substitution', 'Select a player on court to swap.');\n  };\n\n  const handleSubExecute = (courtPlayerId: string) => {\n      if (!isSubMode || !selectedBenchPlayerId || !lineup) return;\n      const newOnCourt = lineup.onCourt.map(slot => {\n          if (slot.playerId === courtPlayerId) return { ...slot, playerId: selectedBenchPlayerId };\n          return slot;\n      });\n      const newBench = lineup.benchPlayerIds.filter(id => id !== selectedBenchPlayerId);\n      newBench.push(courtPlayerId);\n      setLineup({ ...lineup, onCourt: newOnCourt, benchPlayerIds: newBench });\n      setIsSubMode(false);\n      setSelectedBenchPlayerId(null);\n      showToast('success', 'Substitution', 'Player swapped successfully.');\n  };\n\n  const handleRecordEvent = async () => {\n    if (!selectedPlayerId || !selectedFundamental || !selectedOutcome || !match) return;\n\n    setSaving(true);\n\n    const fundamentalConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[selectedFundamental];\n    const outcomeConfig = fundamentalConfig.outcomes.find(o => o.code === selectedOutcome);\n    \n    // Optimistic Score Update\n    if (outcomeConfig) {\n        const impact = outcomeConfig.rotationImpact;\n        if (impact === 'point_for_us') setTeamPoints(prev => prev + 1);\n        else if (impact === 'point_for_them' || impact === 'card_red') setOpponentPoints(prev => prev + 1);\n    }\n\n    const newEvent: GameEvent = {\n        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),\n        matchId: match.id,\n        playerId: selectedPlayerId,\n        setNumber: currentSet,\n        scoreTeam: teamPoints, // Note: snapshot\n        scoreOpponent: opponentPoints, \n        fundamental: selectedFundamental,\n        outcome: selectedOutcome,\n        isImportantPoint: isImportant,\n        isDecisivePoint: isDecisive,\n        timestamp: Date.now()\n    };\n\n    try {\n        await saveEvent(newEvent);\n        \n        const updatedEvents = [...events, newEvent];\n        setEvents(updatedEvents);\n        \n        // RECOMPUTE STATS\n        recomputeDerivedData(updatedEvents, currentSet);\n\n        // Automatic Rotation Logic\n        if (outcomeConfig && lineup) {\n            const impact = outcomeConfig.rotationImpact;\n            if (impact === 'point_for_us') {\n                if (!hasRotatedInCurrentRun) {\n                    const updatedLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n                    setLineup(updatedLineup);\n                    setRotationIndex(updatedLineup.rotationIndex);\n                    setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(true);\n                    showToast('info', 'Side-Out', 'Rotation applied automatically.');\n                }\n            } else if (impact === 'point_for_them') {\n                setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false);\n            } else if (impact === 'card_red') {\n                const updatedLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n                setLineup(updatedLineup);\n                setRotationIndex(updatedLineup.rotationIndex);\n                setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false); \n            }\n        }\n\n        showToast('success', 'Event Saved', `${FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[selectedFundamental].label} recorded.`);\n        \n        setSelectedFundamental(null);\n        setSelectedOutcome(null);\n        setSelectedPlayerId(null); \n    } catch (e) {\n        showToast('error', 'Save Failed', 'Could not save the event.');\n    } finally {\n        setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (loading) return <div className=\"h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl text-teal animate-pulse\">LOADING COURT...</div>;\n  if (!match || !lineup) return <div className=\"h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl text-terracotta\">SETUP FAILED</div>;\n\n  // -- RENDER HELPERS --\n  \n  const getGridArea = (pos: CourtPosition) => {\n      switch(pos) {\n          case 4: return 'row-start-1 col-start-1';\n          case 3: return 'row-start-1 col-start-2';\n          case 2: return 'row-start-1 col-start-3';\n          case 5: return 'row-start-2 col-start-1';\n          case 6: return 'row-start-2 col-start-2';\n          case 1: return 'row-start-2 col-start-3';\n      }\n  };\n\n  const isFormValid = selectedPlayerId && selectedFundamental && selectedOutcome;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-[calc(100vh-100px)] flex flex-col font-sans overflow-hidden bg-cream-light\">\n      \n      {/* 1. persist lineup changes (rotations/subs), and render the full Analytics and Timeline UI.\n\n```tsx\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { Match, Player, Fundamental, OutcomeCode, GameEvent, User, UserRole, MatchLineup, CourtPosition, PlayerPosition, RotationImpact, SetScore, PlayerLiveStats, TeamMatchStats, RallyEntry } from '../types';\nimport { getMatches, getTeamPlayers, saveMatchEvents, saveEvent, getInitialLineupForMatch, getMatchEvents, updateLineup } from '../services/mockService';\nimport { computeLiveRatingsForMatch } from '../lib/liveRating';\nimport { aggregatePlayerStats, aggregateTeamStats, buildRallyTimeline } from '../lib/statsHelpers';\nimport { Button } from '../components/ui/Buttons';\n\ninterface ScoutingProps {\n  matchId: string;\n  user: User;\n  onFinished: () => void;\n  showToast: (type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info', title: string, message?: string) => void;\n}\n\n// --- CONFIGURATION ---\n\ntype OutcomeConfig = {\n  code: OutcomeCode;\n  label: string;\n  symbol: string; // e.g., \"+\", \"++\", \"-\", \"--\"\n  rotationImpact: RotationImpact;\n};\n\ntype FundamentalConfig = {\n  label: string;\n  outcomes: OutcomeConfig[];\n};\n\nconst FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG: Record<Fundamental, FundamentalConfig> = {\n  attack: {\n    label: 'Attacco',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'attack_point',   label: 'Punto',    symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'attack_blocked', label: 'Murato',   symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'attack_error',   label: 'Errore',   symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'attack_defended',label: 'Difeso',   symbol: '0',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n    ],\n  },\n  reception: {\n    label: 'Ricezione',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'reception_perfect',         label: 'Perfetta', symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'reception_positive',        label: 'Positiva', symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'reception_negative',        label: 'Negativa', symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'reception_ace_conceded',    label: 'Ace subito', symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  serve: {\n    label: 'Battuta',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'serve_ace',          label: 'Ace',             symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'serve_good_pressure',label: 'Forzata',         symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'serve_in_play',      label: 'In gioco',        symbol: '0',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'serve_error',        label: 'Errore',          symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  block: {\n    label: 'Muro',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'block_point',   label: 'Muro punto', symbol: '++', rotationImpact: 'point_for_us' },\n      { code: 'block_touch',   label: 'Tocco',      symbol: '+',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'block_late_miss', label: 'Fuori tempo', symbol: '-', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  defense: {\n    label: 'Difesa',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'defense_great', label: 'Difesa top', symbol: '+', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'defense_ok',    label: 'Difesa ok',  symbol: '0', rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'defense_error', label: 'Errore',     symbol: '-', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n    ],\n  },\n  error_other: {\n    label: 'Errori',\n    outcomes: [\n      { code: 'net_fault',      label: 'Fallo rete',      symbol: '-',  rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'rotation_fault', label: 'Fallo rotazione', symbol: '--', rotationImpact: 'point_for_them' },\n      { code: 'card_yellow',    label: 'Giallo',          symbol: 'Y',  rotationImpact: 'neutral' },\n      { code: 'card_red',       label: 'Rosso',           symbol: 'R',  rotationImpact: 'card_red' },\n    ],\n  },\n};\n\n// --- HELPERS ---\n\nconst getRoleInitial = (position: PlayerPosition): string => {\n  switch (position) {\n    case PlayerPosition.SETTER: return 'S';\n    case PlayerPosition.OPPOSITE: return 'O';\n    case PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER: return 'OH';\n    case PlayerPosition.MIDDLE_BLOCKER: return 'MB';\n    case PlayerPosition.LIBERO: return 'L';\n    default: return '?';\n  }\n};\n\nconst getOutcomeColor = (code: OutcomeCode) => {\n    if (code.includes('point') || code.includes('ace') || code.includes('perfect') || code.includes('great')) return 'bg-lime text-black border-black';\n    if (code.includes('error') || code.includes('fault') || code.includes('conceded')) return 'bg-terracotta text-cream border-black';\n    return 'bg-cream-dark text-black border-black';\n};\n\nconst rotateLineupLogic = (currentLineup: MatchLineup): MatchLineup => {\n    const nextPosMap: Record<number, CourtPosition> = {\n        1: 6, 6: 5, 5: 4, 4: 3, 3: 2, 2: 1\n    };\n    const nextOnCourt = currentLineup.onCourt.map(slot => ({\n        ...slot,\n        position: nextPosMap[slot.position]\n    }));\n    return {\n        ...currentLineup,\n        onCourt: nextOnCourt,\n        rotationIndex: currentLineup.rotationIndex + 1\n    };\n};\n\nconst isSetOver = (setNumber: number, teamPts: number, oppPts: number): { finished: boolean; winner: 'us' | 'them' | null } => {\n  const target = setNumber === 5 ? 15 : 25;\n  if (teamPts >= target || oppPts >= target) {\n    const diff = Math.abs(teamPts - oppPts);\n    if (diff >= 2) {\n      if (teamPts > oppPts) return { finished: true, winner: 'us' };\n      if (oppPts > teamPts) return { finished: true, winner: 'them' };\n    }\n  }\n  return { finished: false, winner: null };\n};\n\nconst StatBar: React.FC<{ label: string; value: number; total?: number }> = ({ label, value, total }) => {\n  const pct = total && total > 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between text-xs mb-1 font-bold\">\n        <span>{label}</span>\n        <span>{value} <span className=\"text-gray-400 font-normal\">({pct}%)</span></span>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"h-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-black/10 overflow-hidden\">\n        <div\n          className=\"h-full bg-teal\"\n          style={{ width: `${Math.min(pct, 100)}%` }}\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport const Scouting: React.FC<ScoutingProps> = ({ matchId, user, onFinished, showToast }) => {\n  // Data State\n  const [match, setMatch] = useState<Match | null>(null);\n  const [players, setPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);\n  const [lineup, setLineup] = useState<MatchLineup | null>(null);\n  const [events, setEvents] = useState<GameEvent[]>([]);\n  \n  // UI State\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Stats State\n  const [livePlayerStats, setLivePlayerStats] = useState<Record<string, PlayerLiveStats>>({});\n  const [teamMatchStats, setTeamMatchStats] = useState<TeamMatchStats | null>(null);\n  const [rallyTimeline, setRallyTimeline] = useState<RallyEntry[]>([]);\n  const [selectedPlayerForStats, setSelectedPlayerForStats] = useState<Player | null>(null);\n\n  // Game Score State\n  const [currentSet, setCurrentSet] = useState(1);\n  const [teamPoints, setTeamPoints] = useState(0);\n  const [opponentPoints, setOpponentPoints] = useState(0);\n  const [setScores, setSetScores] = useState<SetScore[]>([\n    { setNumber: 1, teamPoints: 0, opponentPoints: 0, isFinished: false },\n  ]);\n  const [setsWonUs, setSetsWonUs] = useState<number>(0);\n  const [setsWonThem, setSetsWonThem] = useState<number>(0);\n  \n  const [rotationIndex, setRotationIndex] = useState(0);\n  const [hasRotatedInCurrentRun, setHasRotatedInCurrentRun] = useState<boolean>(false);\n\n  // Interaction State\n  const [selectedPlayerId, setSelectedPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [selectedFundamental, setSelectedFundamental] = useState<Fundamental | null>(null);\n  const [selectedOutcome, setSelectedOutcome] = useState<OutcomeCode | null>(null);\n  const [isImportant, setIsImportant] = useState(false);\n  const [isDecisive, setIsDecisive] = useState(false);\n\n  const [isSubMode, setIsSubMode] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedBenchPlayerId, setSelectedBenchPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // --- DERIVED STATE ---\n  \n  const playersById = useMemo(() => {\n      const map: Record<string, { position: PlayerPosition, data: Player }> = {};\n      players.forEach(p => map[p.id] = { position: p.position, data: p });\n      return map;\n  }, [players]);\n\n  const liveRatings = useMemo(() => {\n      return computeLiveRatingsForMatch(events, playersById);\n  }, [events, playersById]);\n\n  // --- HELPERS FOR STATS ---\n\n  const recomputeDerivedData = (updatedEvents: GameEvent[], currentSetNum: number) => {\n      if (!match) return;\n      const ourTeamId = match.teamId;\n\n      // 1. Player Stats\n      const pStats = aggregatePlayerStats(updatedEvents, match.id);\n      setLivePlayerStats(pStats);\n\n      // 2. Team Stats\n      const tStats = aggregateTeamStats(updatedEvents, match.id, ourTeamId);\n      setTeamMatchStats(tStats);\n\n      // 3. Timeline\n      const timeline = buildRallyTimeline(updatedEvents, match.id, {\n          startingSetNumber: currentSetNum,\n          teamId: ourTeamId,\n          scoreByPoint: (ev: GameEvent) => {\n              const fundConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[ev.fundamental];\n              const outcomeConfig = fundConfig?.outcomes.find(o => o.code === ev.outcome);\n              if (!outcomeConfig) return null;\n              \n              if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_us') return { scoringSide: 'us' };\n              if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_them' || outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'card_red') return { scoringSide: 'them' };\n              return null;\n          }\n      });\n      setRallyTimeline(timeline);\n  };\n\n  // --- INITIALIZATION ---\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const init = async () => {\n       try {\n           const [matches, teamPlayers, initialLineup, existingEvents] = await Promise.all([\n               getMatches('t1'),\n               getTeamPlayers('t1'),\n               getInitialLineupForMatch(matchId),\n               getMatchEvents(matchId)\n           ]);\n           \n           const m = matches.find(x => x.id === matchId);\n           setMatch(m || null);\n           setPlayers(teamPlayers);\n           setLineup(initialLineup);\n           setEvents(existingEvents);\n\n           // Initialize derived stats from existing events\n           if (m && existingEvents.length > 0) {\n               // Determine current set from events\n               const maxSet = Math.max(...existingEvents.map(e => e.setNumber));\n               setCurrentSet(maxSet);\n\n               // Restore Score (Simplified replay)\n               let tp = 0; \n               let op = 0;\n               existingEvents.filter(e => e.setNumber === maxSet).forEach(ev => {\n                   const fundConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[ev.fundamental];\n                   const outcome = fundConfig?.outcomes.find(o => o.code === ev.outcome);\n                   if (outcome) {\n                       if (outcome.rotationImpact === 'point_for_us') tp++;\n                       if (outcome.rotationImpact === 'point_for_them' || outcome.rotationImpact === 'card_red') op++;\n                   }\n               });\n               setTeamPoints(tp);\n               setOpponentPoints(op);\n\n               // Calculate stats\n               // We need to call this after match state is set, but since it's async closure, 'match' var isn't set yet.\n               // We use 'm' and 'm.id'\n               \n               const pStats = aggregatePlayerStats(existingEvents, m.id);\n               setLivePlayerStats(pStats);\n\n               const tStats = aggregateTeamStats(existingEvents, m.id, m.teamId);\n               setTeamMatchStats(tStats);\n               \n               // Timeline build\n               const timeline = buildRallyTimeline(existingEvents, m.id, {\n                    startingSetNumber: maxSet,\n                    teamId: m.teamId,\n                    scoreByPoint: (ev: GameEvent) => {\n                        const fundConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[ev.fundamental];\n                        const outcomeConfig = fundConfig?.outcomes.find(o => o.code === ev.outcome);\n                        if (!outcomeConfig) return null;\n                        if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_us') return { scoringSide: 'us' };\n                        if (outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'point_for_them' || outcomeConfig.rotationImpact === 'card_red') return { scoringSide: 'them' };\n                        return null;\n                    }\n               });\n               setRallyTimeline(timeline);\n           } else if (m) {\n               // Initialize empty stats\n               recomputeDerivedData([], 1);\n           }\n\n       } catch (error) {\n           showToast('error', 'Load Failed', 'Could not load match data.');\n       } finally {\n           setLoading(false);\n       }\n    };\n    init();\n  }, [matchId]); \n\n  // Auto-context logic\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const criticalScore = 20;\n    const isEndGame = teamPoints >= criticalScore || opponentPoints >= criticalScore;\n    setIsImportant(isEndGame);\n    const isSetPoint = (teamPoints >= 24 || opponentPoints >= 24) && Math.abs(teamPoints - opponentPoints) >= 1;\n    setIsDecisive(isSetPoint);\n  }, [teamPoints, opponentPoints]);\n\n\n  // --- SET MANAGEMENT LOGIC ---\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const { finished, winner } = isSetOver(currentSet, teamPoints, opponentPoints);\n\n    setSetScores((prev) => {\n        const existingIndex = prev.findIndex((s) => s.setNumber === currentSet);\n        const updated: SetScore = {\n          setNumber: currentSet,\n          teamPoints: teamPoints,\n          opponentPoints: opponentPoints,\n          isFinished: finished,\n        };\n        if (existingIndex >= 0) {\n          const clone = [...prev];\n          clone[existingIndex] = updated;\n          return clone;\n        }\n        return [...prev, updated];\n    });\n\n    if (finished) {\n      showToast('success', `Set ${currentSet} Finished!`, `Winner: ${winner === 'us' ? 'Us' : 'Them'}`);\n\n      if (winner === 'us') setSetsWonUs((prev) => prev + 1);\n      else if (winner === 'them') setSetsWonThem((prev) => prev + 1);\n\n      if (currentSet < 5) {\n        const nextSetNumber = currentSet + 1;\n        setTeamPoints(0);\n        setOpponentPoints(0);\n        setCurrentSet(nextSetNumber);\n        setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false);\n        \n        if (lineup) {\n            setLineup(prev => prev ? ({ ...prev, rotationIndex: 0 }) : null);\n            setRotationIndex(0);\n        }\n        \n        setSetScores((prev) => [\n            ...prev,\n            { setNumber: nextSetNumber, teamPoints: 0, opponentPoints: 0, isFinished: false }\n        ]);\n        \n        // Reset timeline for new set\n        setRallyTimeline([]);\n      }\n    }\n  }, [teamPoints, opponentPoints, currentSet]);\n\n\n  // --- HANDLERS ---\n\n  const handleManualRotate = async () => {\n      if (!lineup) return;\n      const nextLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n      \n      // Update local state\n      setLineup(nextLineup);\n      setRotationIndex(nextLineup.rotationIndex);\n      setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false); \n      \n      // Persist\n      await updateLineup(nextLineup);\n\n      showToast('info', 'Rotated', 'Manual rotation completed.');\n  };\n\n  const handleSubSelectBench = (playerId: string) => {\n      setIsSubMode(true);\n      setSelectedBenchPlayerId(playerId);\n      showToast('info', 'Substitution', 'Select a player on court to swap.');\n  };\n\n  const handleSubExecute = async (courtPlayerId: string) => {\n      if (!isSubMode || !selectedBenchPlayerId || !lineup) return;\n\n      const newOnCourt = lineup.onCourt.map(slot => {\n          if (slot.playerId === courtPlayerId) return { ...slot, playerId: selectedBenchPlayerId };\n          return slot;\n      });\n      const newBench = lineup.benchPlayerIds.filter(id => id !== selectedBenchPlayerId);\n      newBench.push(courtPlayerId);\n\n      const updatedLineup = { ...lineup, onCourt: newOnCourt, benchPlayerIds: newBench };\n      \n      setLineup(updatedLineup);\n      setIsSubMode(false);\n      setSelectedBenchPlayerId(null);\n      \n      // Persist\n      await updateLineup(updatedLineup);\n\n      showToast('success', 'Substitution', 'Player swapped successfully.');\n  };\n\n  const handleRecordEvent = async () => {\n    if (!selectedPlayerId || !selectedFundamental || !selectedOutcome || !match) return;\n\n    setSaving(true);\n\n    const fundamentalConfig = FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[selectedFundamental];\n    const outcomeConfig = fundamentalConfig.outcomes.find(o => o.code === selectedOutcome);\n    \n    // Optimistic Score Update\n    if (outcomeConfig) {\n        const impact = outcomeConfig.rotationImpact;\n        if (impact === 'point_for_us') setTeamPoints(prev => prev + 1);\n        else if (impact === 'point_for_them' || impact === 'card_red') setOpponentPoints(prev => prev + 1);\n    }\n\n    const newEvent: GameEvent = {\n        id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),\n        matchId: match.id,\n        playerId: selectedPlayerId,\n        setNumber: currentSet,\n        scoreTeam: teamPoints, \n        scoreOpponent: opponentPoints, \n        fundamental: selectedFundamental,\n        outcome: selectedOutcome,\n        isImportantPoint: isImportant,\n        isDecisivePoint: isDecisive,\n        timestamp: Date.now()\n    };\n\n    try {\n        await saveEvent(newEvent);\n        \n        const updatedEvents = [...events, newEvent];\n        setEvents(updatedEvents);\n        \n        // RECOMPUTE STATS\n        recomputeDerivedData(updatedEvents, currentSet);\n\n        // Automatic Rotation Logic\n        if (outcomeConfig && lineup) {\n            const impact = outcomeConfig.rotationImpact;\n            let updatedLineup = lineup;\n            let shouldPersistLineup = false;\n\n            if (impact === 'point_for_us') {\n                if (!hasRotatedInCurrentRun) {\n                    updatedLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n                    setLineup(updatedLineup);\n                    setRotationIndex(updatedLineup.rotationIndex);\n                    setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(true);\n                    shouldPersistLineup = true;\n                    showToast('info', 'Side-Out', 'Rotation applied automatically.');\n                }\n            } else if (impact === 'point_for_them') {\n                setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false);\n            } else if (impact === 'card_red') {\n                updatedLineup = rotateLineupLogic(lineup);\n                setLineup(updatedLineup);\n                setRotationIndex(updatedLineup.rotationIndex);\n                setHasRotatedInCurrentRun(false); \n                shouldPersistLineup = true;\n            }\n\n            if (shouldPersistLineup) {\n                await updateLineup(updatedLineup);\n            }\n        }\n\n        showToast('success', 'Event Saved', `${FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[selectedFundamental].label} recorded.`);\n        \n        setSelectedFundamental(null);\n        setSelectedOutcome(null);\n        setSelectedPlayerId(null); \n    } catch (e) {\n        showToast('error', 'Save Failed', 'Could not save the event.');\n    } finally {\n        setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (loading) return <div className=\"h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl text-teal animate-pulse\">LOADING COURT...</div>;\n  if (!match || !lineup) return <div className=\"h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl text-terracotta\">SETUP FAILED</div>;\n\n  // -- RENDER HELPERS --\n  \n  const getGridArea = (pos: CourtPosition) => {\n      switch(pos) {\n          case 4: return 'row-start-1 col-start-1';\n          case 3: return 'row-start-1 col-start-2';\n          case 2: return 'row-start-1 col-start-3';\n          case 5: return 'row-start-2 col-start-1';\n          case 6: return 'row-start-2 col-start-2';\n          case 1: return 'row-start-2 col-start-3';\n      }\n  };\n\n  const isFormValid = selectedPlayerId && selectedFundamental && selectedOutcome;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-[calc(100vh-100px)] flex flex-col font-sans overflow-hidden bg-cream-light\">\n      \n      {/* 1. TOP HEADER (Scoreboard) */}\n      <div className=\"bg-navy-muted text-cream-light p-3 md:p-4 rounded-b-xl shadow-cartoon flex justify-between items-center z-20 shrink-0\">\n         <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 md:gap-8\">\n            <div className=\"text-right\">\n                <div className=\"font-title text-5xl md:text-7xl text-lime leading-[0.8]\">{teamPoints}</div>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"h-10 w-[3px] bg-white/20\"></div>\n            <div>\n                <div className=\"font-title text-5xl md:text-7xl text-coral-volley leading-[0.8]\">{opponentPoints}</div>\n            </div>\n         </div>\n\n         <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center\">\n             <h1 className=\"font-title text-2xl md:text-4xl uppercase tracking-wider text-white\">{match.opponentName}</h1>\n             <div className=\"flex gap-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase opacity-70 tracking-widest\">\n                 <span>Set {currentSet}</span> • <span>Rot. {rotationIndex}</span>\n             </div>\n         </div>\n\n         <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            <Button variant=\"danger\" size=\"sm\" onClick={onFinished}>\n                Finish\n            </Button>\n         </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 2. MAIN LAYOUT */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 min-h-0 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4 md:p-6\">\n         \n         {/* LEFT COLUMN: COURT & BENCH */}\n         <div className=\"w-full md:w-[45%] lg:w-[40%] flex flex-col gap-4 min-h-0\">\n             \n             {/* THE COURT */}\n             <div className=\"relative bg-orange-100 border-4 border-terracotta rounded-xl shadow-cartoon flex-1 min-h-[350px]\">\n                 {/* Net Marker */}\n                 <div className=\"absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-2 bg-white/50 z-0\"></div>\n                 <div className=\"absolute top-0 left-1/3 bottom-0 w-1 bg-terracotta/20 z-0\"></div>\n                 <div className=\"absolute top-0 right-1/3 bottom-0 w-1 bg-terracotta/20 z-0\"></div>\n                 <div className=\"absolute top-1/2 left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-terracotta/20 z-0\"></div>\n\n                 {/* Player Grid */}\n                 <div className=\"absolute inset-0 grid grid-cols-3 grid-rows-2 p-2 gap-2 z-10\">\n                     {lineup.onCourt.map((slot) => {\n                         const player = playersById[slot.playerId]?.data;\n                         const rating = liveRatings[slot.playerId]?.rating || 6.0;\n                         const isSelected = selectedPlayerId === slot.playerId;\n                         const roleInitial = player ? getRoleInitial(player.position) : '?';\n                         \n                         if (!player) return null;\n\n                         return (\n                             <div \n                                key={slot.playerId}\n                                className={`\n                                    relative ${getGridArea(slot.position)}\n                                    bg-white border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl p-2\n                                    flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-all duration-200\n                                    ${isSelected ? 'bg-volley-blue text-white ring-4 ring-black/20 shadow-none scale-95' : 'shadow-cartoon hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-cartoon-hover'}\n                                    ${isSubMode ? 'animate-pulse ring-4 ring-terracotta' : ''}\n                                `}\n                                onClick={() => {\n                                    if(isSubMode) {\n                                        handleSubExecute(slot.playerId);\n                                    } else {\n                                        setSelectedPlayerId(slot.playerId);\n                                        setSelectedPlayerForStats(player); // Also show stats\n                                    }\n                                }}\n                             >\n                                 {/* ROLE BADGE */}\n                                 <div className=\"absolute top-1 left-1 bg-black text-cream text-[10px] font-soft px-2 py-[1px] rounded-full uppercase border border-white/20\">\n                                    {roleInitial}\n                                 </div>\n                                 \n                                 <div className=\"absolute top-1 right-2 text-xs font-bold opacity-30\">P{slot.position}</div>\n\n                                 <div className=\"font-title text-4xl leading-none mt-3\">{player.shirtNumber}</div>\n                                 <div className=\"text-xs font-bold uppercase truncate max-w-full\">{player.lastName}</div>\n\n                                 {/* RATING LIVE */}\n                                 <div className={`\n                                     mt-1 px-2 py-[2px] rounded border border-black font-title text-sm\n                                     ${rating >= 7.5 ? 'bg-lime text-black' : rating < 5.5 ? 'bg-terracotta text-white' : 'bg-cream-dark text-black'}\n                                 `}>\n                                     {rating.toFixed(1)}\n                                 </div>\n                             </div>\n                         );\n                     })}\n                 </div>\n             </div>\n\n             {/* ACTIONS BAR (Rotate / Bench) */}\n             <div className=\"flex gap-4 h-32 shrink-0\">\n                 <button \n                    onClick={handleManualRotate}\n                    className=\"w-24 bg-navy-muted text-cream-light border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center shadow-cartoon active:shadow-none active:translate-y-1 transition-all\"\n                 >\n                     <span className=\"text-3xl\">↻</span>\n                     <span className=\"font-title text-lg uppercase tracking-wider\">Rotate</span>\n                 </button>\n\n                 <div className=\"flex-1 bg-cream-dark border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl p-3 shadow-cartoon overflow-x-auto flex gap-3 items-center\">\n                     <div className=\"font-title text-xl text-black/30 vertical-rl rotate-180 text-center\">BENCH</div>\n                     {lineup.benchPlayerIds.map(pid => {\n                         const p = playersById[pid]?.data;\n                         if(!p) return null;\n                         const isSelectedBench = selectedBenchPlayerId === pid;\n\n                         return (\n                            <button\n                                key={pid}\n                                onClick={() => handleSubSelectBench(pid)}\n                                className={`\n                                    shrink-0 w-16 h-full bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-all\n                                    ${isSelectedBench ? 'bg-terracotta text-white' : 'hover:bg-gray-100'}\n                                `}\n                            >\n                                <span className=\"font-title text-2xl\">{p.shirtNumber}</span>\n                                <span className=\"text-[10px] uppercase font-bold truncate w-full px-1\">{p.lastName}</span>\n                            </button>\n                         );\n                     })}\n                 </div>\n             </div>\n         </div>\n\n         {/* RIGHT COLUMN: CONTROLS & STATS */}\n         <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 gap-4 overflow-y-auto pr-2\">\n             \n             {/* 1. INPUT PANEL (Always visible or primary) */}\n             <div className=\"bg-white border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl p-4 shadow-cartoon shrink-0\">\n                 {/* Header */}\n                 <div className=\"h-12 flex items-center justify-between border-b-2 border-gray-100 pb-2 mb-2\">\n                     <span className=\"font-title text-2xl text-navy-muted uppercase\">Event Recorder</span>\n                     {selectedPlayerId ? (\n                         <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-volley-blue text-white px-4 py-1 rounded-full border-2 border-black font-bold uppercase text-sm animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-right\">\n                             <span>#{playersById[selectedPlayerId]?.data.shirtNumber} {playersById[selectedPlayerId]?.data.lastName}</span>\n                         </div>\n                     ) : (\n                        <span className=\"text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase text-sm animate-pulse\">Select a player on court</span>\n                     )}\n                 </div>\n\n                 {/* Fundamentals */}\n                 <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-3\">\n                     {(Object.keys(FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG) as Fundamental[]).map(fund => (\n                         <button\n                            key={fund}\n                            disabled={!selectedPlayerId}\n                            onClick={() => { setSelectedFundamental(fund); setSelectedOutcome(null); }}\n                            className={`\n                                py-2 rounded-lg border-2 border-black font-title text-lg uppercase tracking-wider transition-all\n                                ${selectedFundamental === fund \n                                    ? 'bg-lime text-black shadow-none translate-y-[2px]' \n                                    : 'bg-cream-dark hover:bg-cream shadow-cartoon-sm'\n                                }\n                                ${!selectedPlayerId ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}\n                            `}\n                         >\n                            {FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[fund].label}\n                         </button>\n                     ))}\n                 </div>\n\n                 {/* Outcomes */}\n                 <div className=\"bg-cream-light border-2 border-black/10 rounded-xl p-2 mb-3 min-h-[90px] flex items-center justify-center\">\n                    {selectedFundamental ? (\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-2 w-full\">\n                            {FUNDAMENTAL_CONFIG[selectedFundamental].outcomes.map(outcome => (\n                                <button\n                                    key={outcome.code}\n                                    onClick={() => setSelectedOutcome(outcome.code)}\n                                    className={`\n                                        min-h-[70px] rounded-xl border-2 font-bold uppercase text-xs p-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center transition-all\n                                        ${selectedOutcome === outcome.code \n                                            ? 'ring-4 ring-offset-2 ring-black scale-95 shadow-none' \n                                            : 'shadow-cartoon-sm hover:scale-105'\n                                        }\n                                        ${getOutcomeColor(outcome.code)}\n                                    `}\n                                >\n                                    <span className=\"font-soft text-xs mb-1\">{outcome.label}</span>\n                                    <span className=\"font-mono text-lg opacity-80 leading-none\">{outcome.symbol}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    ) : (\n                        <span className=\"text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase text-xs\">Select Fundamental</span>\n                    )}\n                 </div>\n\n                 <button\n                    onClick={handleRecordEvent}\n                    disabled={!isFormValid || saving}\n                    className={`\n                        w-full py-3 rounded-xl border-[3px] border-black font-title text-2xl uppercase tracking-widest transition-all\n                        ${isFormValid \n                            ? 'bg-navy-muted text-lime hover:bg-black shadow-cartoon hover:shadow-cartoon-hover active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none' \n                            : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed'\n                        }\n                    `}\n                 >\n                    {saving ? '...' : 'RECORD'}\n                 </button>\n             </div>\n\n             {/* 2. PLAYER DETAILS PANEL (If Selected) */}\n             {selectedPlayerForStats && (\n              <div className=\"bg-cream-dark border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl shadow-cartoon p-4 animate-in slide-in-from-right fade-in duration-300\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3 border-b-2 border-black/10 pb-2\">\n                  <div>\n                    <div className=\"text-xs font-soft uppercase text-terracotta font-bold\">Live Stats</div>\n                    <div className=\"font-title text-3xl leading-none\">\n                      {selectedPlayerForStats.firstName} {selectedPlayerForStats.lastName}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"bg-lime border-2 border-black rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-center\">\n                    <div className=\"text-[9px] font-soft uppercase font-bold\">RATING</div>\n                    <div className=\"font-title text-2xl leading-none\">\n                      {liveRatings[selectedPlayerForStats.id]?.rating?.toFixed(1) ?? '6.0'}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n\n                {(() => {\n                  const stats = livePlayerStats[selectedPlayerForStats.id];\n                  if (!stats) return <div className=\"text-sm font-soft text-black/60 italic\">No data yet.</div>;\n\n                  const attackEff = stats.attacks > 0 ? Math.round(((stats.attackPoints - stats.attackErrors - stats.attackBlocked) / stats.attacks) * 100) : 0;\n                  const receptionEff = stats.receptions > 0 ? Math.round((stats.perfectReceptions + stats.positiveReceptions) / stats.receptions * 100) : 0;\n                  \n                  return (\n                    <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-2 text-sm font-soft\">\n                      <div className=\"col-span-2\">\n                          <StatBar label=\"Attack Efficiency\" value={attackEff} total={100} />\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <span className=\"font-bold text-xs uppercase text-gray-500\">Attack</span>\n                        <div className=\"font-bold\">{stats.attackPoints} / {stats.attacks} <span className=\"text-terracotta\">({stats.attackErrors} err)</span></div>\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <span className=\"font-bold text-xs uppercase text-gray-500\">Serve</span>\n                        <div className=\"font-bold\">{stats.aces} Ace / {stats.serveErrors} Err</div>\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <span className=\"font-bold text-xs uppercase text-gray-500\">Reception</span>\n                        <div className=\"font-bold\">{receptionEff}% Pos</div>\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <span className=\"font-bold text-xs uppercase text-gray-500\">Block</span>\n                        <div className=\"font-bold\">{stats.blockPoints} Pts</div>\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  );\n                })()}\n              </div>\n             )}\n\n             {/* 3. TEAM ANALYTICS & TIMELINE */}\n             <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n                 {/* Analytics */}\n                 {teamMatchStats && (\n                  <div className=\"bg-white border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl p-4 shadow-cartoon\">\n                    <div className=\"font-title text-xl mb-3 uppercase\">Team Stats</div>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                      <StatBar label=\"Attack Points\" value={teamMatchStats.pointsFromAttack} total={teamMatchStats.totalPoints} />\n                      <StatBar label=\"Block Points\" value={teamMatchStats.pointsFromBlock} total={teamMatchStats.totalPoints} />\n                      <StatBar label=\"Serve Points\" value={teamMatchStats.pointsFromServe} total={teamMatchStats.totalPoints} />\n                      <div className=\"pt-2 border-t border-gray-100\">\n                          <StatBar label=\"Serve Errors\" value={teamMatchStats.serveErrors} total={teamMatchStats.aces + teamMatchStats.serveErrors + 10} />\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                 )}\n\n                 {/* Timeline */}\n                 <div className=\"bg-white border-[3px] border-black rounded-xl p-4 shadow-cartoon flex flex-col max-h-60\">\n                    <div className=\"font-title text-xl mb-2 uppercase sticky top-0 bg-white\">Set Timeline</div>\n                    <div className=\"overflow-y-auto space-y-1 pr-1 flex-1\">\n                      {rallyTimeline.length === 0 ? <div className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs italic\">No points yet.</div> : null}\n                      {rallyTimeline.map((rally) => (\n                        <div key={rally.id} className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-2 py-1 rounded bg-cream-dark text-xs border border-transparent hover:border-black/10\">\n                          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                            <span className=\"text-lg leading-none\">🏐</span>\n                            <span className=\"font-mono font-bold text-sm\">\n                              {rally.teamPointsAfter}-{rally.opponentPointsAfter}\n                            </span>\n                          </div>\n                          <div className=\"text-right\">\n                            <span className={`font-bold uppercase ${rally.scoringSide === 'us' ? 'text-teal' : 'text-terracotta'}`}>\n                              {rally.scoringSide === 'us' ? 'US' : 'THEM'}\n                            </span>\n                            {rally.scoringPlayerId && playersById[rally.scoringPlayerId] && (\n                              <span className=\"ml-1 opacity-60\">\n                                ({playersById[rally.scoringPlayerId].data.shirtNumber})\n                              </span>\n                            )}\n                          </div>\n                        </div>\n                      ))}\n                    </div>\n                 </div>\n             </div>\n\n         </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n```\n\n## services/mockService.ts\n\nUpdated to include persistent lineup storage (so rotations are saved) and updated accessor methods for consistency.\n\n```tsx\nimport { User, Club, Team, Player, Match, PlayerPosition, UserRole, GameEvent, PlayerMatchStats, MatchLineup, CourtPosition } from '../types';\nimport { computeVolleyRating } from '../lib/ratingSystem';\nimport { aggregatePlayerStats } from '../lib/statsHelpers';\n\n// --- MOCK DATA ---\n\nconst MOCK_USER: User = {\n  id: 'u1',\n  name: 'Coach Carter',\n  email: 'coach@volley.com',\n  role: UserRole.STAFF\n};\n\nconst MOCK_CLUB: Club = {\n  id: 'c1',\n  name: 'Volley Milano',\n  city: 'Milano'\n};\n\nconst MOCK_TEAM: Team = {\n  id: 't1',\n  clubId: 'c1',\n  name: 'Under 19 Red',\n  category: 'U19',\n  gender: 'M'\n};\n\nconst MOCK_PLAYERS: Player[] = [\n  { id: 'p1', teamId: 't1', firstName: 'Alessandro', lastName: 'Michieletto', position: PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER, shirtNumber: 5, averageRating: 7.2, region: 'Lombardia', category: 'U19', matchesPlayed: 12, trend: 'up' },\n  { id: 'p2', teamId: 't1', firstName: 'Simone', lastName: 'Giannelli', position: PlayerPosition.SETTER, shirtNumber: 9, averageRating: 7.5, region: 'Lombardia', category: 'U19', matchesPlayed: 12, trend: 'stable' },\n  { id: 'p3', teamId: 't1', firstName: 'Fabio', lastName: 'Balaso', position: PlayerPosition.LIBERO, shirtNumber: 13, averageRating: 6.8, region: 'Lombardia', category: 'U19', matchesPlayed: 11, trend: 'down' },\n  { id: 'p4', teamId: 't1', firstName: 'Yuri', lastName: 'Romano', position: PlayerPosition.OPPOSITE, shirtNumber: 16, averageRating: 6.9, region: 'Lombardia', category: 'U19', matchesPlayed: 10, trend: 'up' },\n  { id: 'p5', teamId: 't1', from '../types';\nimport { computeVolleyRating } from '../lib/ratingSystem';\nimport { aggregatePlayerStats } from '../lib/statsHelpers'; // se necessario\n\n// [... esistenti getTeamPlayers, getMatches, getEventsForMatch ecc. ...]\n\nexport async function updatePlayer(updated: Player): Promise<Player> {\n  const index = players.findIndex((p) => p.id === updated.id);\n  if (index >= 0) {\n    players[index] = { ...players[index], ...updated };\n  } else {\n    players.push(updated);\n  }\n  return players[index] ?? updated;\n}\n\n/**\n * Restituisce tutte le partite in cui il player ha almeno un evento registrato.\n */\nexport async function getPlayerMatches(playerId: string): Promise<Match[]> {\n  const matchIds = new Set<string>();\n  events.forEach((ev) => {\n    if (ev.playerId === playerId) {\n      matchIds.add(ev.matchId);\n    }\n  });\n  return matches.filter((m) => matchIds.has(m.id));\n}\n\n/**\n * Restituisce le stats per ogni partita in cui il player ha giocato,\n * usando computeVolleyRating e la logica già in uso per PlayerMatchStats.\n */\nexport async function getPlayerMatchStatsForPlayer(playerId: string): Promise<PlayerMatchStats[]> {\n  const result: PlayerMatchStats[] = [];\n\n  const player = players.find((p) => p.id === playerId);\n  if (!player) return result;\n\n  const playerMatches = await getPlayerMatches(playerId);\n\n  for (const match of playerMatches) {\n    const evForMatch = events.filter((ev) => ev.matchId === match.id && ev.playerId === playerId);\n    const ratingResult = computeVolleyRating(evForMatch, { position: player.position });\n\n    // Totals semplici (puoi riusare la logica di aggregatePlayerStats se vuoi)\n    let attacks = 0;\n    let attackPoints = 0;\n    let attackErrors = 0;\n    let serves = 0;\n    let aces = 0;\n    let serveErrors = 0;\n    let receptions = 0;\n    let perfectReceptions = 0;\n    let negativeReceptions = 0;\n    let blocks = 0;\n    let blockPoints = 0;\n    let digs = 0;\n\n    for (const ev of evForMatch) {\n      switch (ev.fundamental) {\n        case 'attack':\n          attacks++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'attack_point') attackPoints++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'attack_error' || ev.outcomeCode === 'attack_blocked') attackErrors++;\n          break;\n        case 'serve':\n          serves++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'serve_ace') aces++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'serve_error') serveErrors++;\n          break;\n        case 'reception':\n          receptions++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'reception_perfect') perfectReceptions++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'reception_negative' || ev.outcomeCode === 'reception_ace_conceded') negativeReceptions++;\n          break;\n        case 'block':\n          blocks++;\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'block_point') blockPoints++;\n          break;\n        case 'defense':\n          if (ev.outcomeCode === 'defense_great' || ev.outcomeCode === 'defense_ok') digs++;\n          break;\n      }\n    }\n\n    result.push({\n      matchId: match.id,\n      playerId,\n      teamId: player.teamId,\n      rating: ratingResult.rating,\n      breakdown: ratingResult.breakdown,\n      totals: {\n        attacks,\n        attackPoints,\n        attackErrors,\n        serves,\n        aces,\n        serveErrors,\n        receptions,\n        perfectReceptions,\n        negativeReceptions,\n        blocks,\n        blockPoints,\n        digs,\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\nQueste funzioni lavorano sui mock e saranno usate dalla pagina di team management e dal PlayerProfile.\n\n────────────────────────────────────────\n3) App.tsx – trasformare la vista TEAM in una pagina di gestione con editing\n\nAttualmente in App.tsx hai un componente interno TeamsView. Lo voglio arricchire, senza spostarlo in un file a parte (per ora va bene tenerlo interno).\n\nApri App.tsx e:\n\nA) Assicurati di importare la nuova funzione:\n\nts\nCopia codice\nimport { codice\nconst TeamsView: React.FC = () => {\n  const [teamPlayers, setTeamPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);\n  const [editingPlayer, setEditingPlayer] = useState<Player | null>(null);\n  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    getTeamPlayers('t1').then(setTeamPlayers);\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleEditChange = (field: keyof Player, value: string) => {\n    if (!editingPlayer) return;\n    let updated: Player = { ...editingPlayer };\n\n    if (field === 'shirtNumber') {\n      updated.shirtNumber = parseInt(value || '0', 10);\n    } else if (field === 'position') {\n      updated.position = value as PlayerPosition;\n    } else {\n      (updated as any)[field] = value;\n    }\n\n    setEditingPlayer(updated);\n  };\n\n  const handleSavePlayer = async () => {\n    if (!editingPlayer) return;\n    setIsSaving(true);\n    try {\n      const saved = await updatePlayer(editingPlayer);\n      setTeamPlayers((prev) =>\n        prev.map((p) => (p.id === saved.id ? saved : p))\n      );\n      setEditingPlayer(null);\n    } finally {\n      setIsSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6\">\n      <div className=\"flex-1\">\n        <h1 className=\"font-title text-5xl mb-6 uppercase\">\n          Team: Under 19 Red\n        </h1>\n        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2     <div className=\"mt-2 flex gap-2\">\n                <Button\n                  size=\"sm\"\n                  variant=\"secondary\"\n                  className=\"flex-1\"\n Modifica\n                </Button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Pannello di editing giocatore */}\n      {editingPlayer && (\n        <aside className=\"md:w-80 bg-cream-dark border-2 border-black rounded-card shadow-cartoon p-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\n            <div>\n              <div className=\"text-xs font-soft uppercase text-terracotta\">\n                Modifica giocatore\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"font-title text-2xl\">\n                #{editingPlayer.shirtNumber}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              className=\"text-xs font-soft underline\"\n              onClick={() => setEditingPlayer(null)}\n            >\n              Chiudi\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"space-y-3 text-sm font-soft\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs uppercase mb-1\">Nome</label>\n              <input\n                className=\"w-full border-2 border-black rounded-card px-2 py-1 bg-white\"\n                value={editingPlayer.firstName}\n                onChange={(e) => handleEditChange('firstName', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs uppercase mb-1\">Cognome</label>\n              <input\n                className=\"w-full border-2 border-black rounded-card px-2 py-1 bg-white\"\n                value={editingPlayer.lastName}\n                onChange={(e) => handleEditChange('lastName', e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs uppercase mb-1\">Numero maglia</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"number\"\n                className=\"w-full border-2 border-black rounded-card px-2 py-1   return item ? JSON.parse(item) : defaultVal;\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(`Error loading ${key}`, e);\n    return defaultVal;\n  }\n};\n\nconst save = <T>(key: string, data: T) => {\n  try {\n    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(`Error saving ${key}`, e);\n  }\n};\n\n// Initialize DB\nif (!localStorage.getItem(KEY_INIT)) {\n  save(KEY_PLAYERS, SEED_PLAYERS);\n  save(KEY_MATCHES, SEED_MATCHES);\n  save(KEY_EVENTS, []);\n  save(KEY_LINEUPS, []);\n  localStorage.setItem(KEY_INIT, 'true');\n}\n\n// --- PLAYER SERVICES   const all = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n    const index = all.findIndex(p => p.id === updated.id);\n    if (index >= 0) {\n      all[index] = { ...all[index], ...updated };\n    } else {\n      if (ev.playerId === playerId) {\n            matchIds.add(ev.matchId);\n        }\n    });\n\n    // For demo continuity with Seed Data, if a seed match is completed but has no events in LS if (isAddingNew) {\n            const created = await createPlayer(editingPlayer);\n            setTeamPlayers(prev => [...prev, created]);\n            addToast('success', 'Player Added', `${created.firstName} joined the team.`);\n        } else {\n            const saved = await updatePlayer(editingPlayer);\n            setTeamPlayers((prev) =>\n            prev.map((p) => (p.id ===   return item ?      const newMatch: Match = {\n            ...matchData,\n            id: 'm_' + Date.now(),\n            status: 'scheduled'\n        };\n        all.unshift(newMatch); // Add to top\n
