migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-01-13T16:24:38.624Z.json:              "target": "",
migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-01-13T16:24:38.624Z.json:              "replacement": "\nimport { GameEvent, MatchLineup, CourtPosition, RotationImpact, OutcomeCode } from '../../types';\n\n// --- TYPES ---\nexport interface DerivedMatchState {\n  currentSet: number;\n  teamPoints: number;\n  opponentPoints: number;\n  currentLineup: MatchLineup;\n  servingSide: 'us' | 'them';\n  isSetFinished: boolean;\n  setWinner: 'us' | 'them' | null;\n  history: GameEvent[]; // The full log used to derive this\n  setsWonUs: number;\n  setsWonThem: number;\n}\n\nexport interface EngineOptions {\n  matchIsHome: boolean;\n}\n\n// --- HELPERS ---\n\nconst getImpact = (outcome?: OutcomeCode): RotationImpact => {\n  if (!outcome) return 'neutral';\n  if (['attack_point', 'serve_ace', 'block_point', 'attack_tool'].includes(outcome)) return 'point_for_us';\n  if (['serve_error', 'attack_error', 'reception_ace_conceded', 'block_invasion', 'net_fault', 'reception_slash', 'rotation_fault', 'block_late_miss', 'attack_blocked'].includes(outcome)) return 'point_for_them';\n  if (outcome === 'card_red') return 'card_red'; // TODO: Handle red card points\n  return 'neutral';\n};\n\nconst rotateLineup = (lineup: MatchLineup): MatchLineup => {\n  const nextPosMap: Record<number, CourtPosition> = {\n    1: 6, 6: 5, 5: 4, 4: 3, 3: 2, 2: 1\n  };\n  const nextOnCourt = lineup.onCourt.map(slot => ({\n    ...slot,\n    position: nextPosMap[slot.position]\n  }));\n  return {\n    ...lineup,\n    onCourt: nextOnCourt,\n    rotationIndex: lineup.rotationIndex + 1\n  };\n};\n\nconst substitutePlayer = (lineup: MatchLineup, inId: string, outId: string): MatchLineup => {\n  const isOnCourt = lineup.onCourt.find(s => s.playerId === outId);\n  if (!isOnCourt) return lineup;\n\n  const newOnCourt = lineup.onCourt.map(s => s.playerId === outId ? { ...s, playerId: inId } : s);\n  const newBench = lineup.benchPlayerIds.filter(id => id !== inId);\n  newBench.push(outId);\n\n  return {\n    ...lineup,\n    onCourt: newOnCourt,\n    benchPlayerIds: newBench\n  };\n};\n\nconst checkSetWin = (us: number, them: number, setNum: number): 'us' | 'them' | null => {\n  const target = setNum === 5 ? 15 : 25;\n  if (us >= target && us - them >= 2) return 'us';\n  if (them >= target && them - us >= 2) return 'them';\n  return null;\n};\n\n// --- CORE REDUCER ---\n\nexport const reduceMatchState = (\n  events: GameEvent[], \n  initialLineup: MatchLineup, \n  options: EngineOptions\n): DerivedMatchState => {\n  \n  // 1. Initialize State\n  // We assume the match starts at 0-0 Set 1.\n  // Initial serving side usually determined by coin toss, here we approximate via 'matchIsHome'.\n  // In a real scenario, a 'MATCH_START' event would dictate the first server.\n  \n  let state: DerivedMatchState = {\n    currentSet: 1,\n    teamPoints: 0,\n    opponentPoints: 0,\n    currentLineup: { ...initialLineup, setNumber: 1 },\n    servingSide: options.matchIsHome ? 'us' : 'them',\n    isSetFinished: false,\n    setWinner: null,\n    history: events,\n    setsWonUs: 0,\n    setsWonThem: 0\n  };\n\n  const sortedEvents = [...events].sort((a, b) => a.timestamp - b.timestamp);\n\n  for (const event of sortedEvents) {\n    \n    // --- 1. SET MANAGEMENT ---\n    if (event.eventType === 'set_start') {\n        // Explicit new set start\n        state.currentSet = event.setNumber;\n        state.teamPoints = 0;\n        state.opponentPoints = 0;\n        state.isSetFinished = false;\n        state.setWinner = null;\n        state.currentLineup.setNumber = event.setNumber;\n        // Logic: Who serves next? Usually loser of previous set, or alternating.\n        // For MVP we can toggle based on set number relative to home/away\n        const isOddSet = event.setNumber % 2 !== 0;\n        state.servingSide = (isOddSet === options.matchIsHome) ? 'us' : 'them';\n        continue;\n    }\n\n    // --- 2. SUBSTITUTIONS ---\n    if (event.eventType === 'sub' && event.subInPlayerId && event.subOutPlayerId) {\n        state.currentLineup = substitutePlayer(state.currentLineup, event.subInPlayerId, event.subOutPlayerId);\n        continue;\n    }\n\n    // --- 3. MANUAL ADJUSTMENTS (For corrections without logic) ---\n    if (event.eventType === 'manual_adjustment' && event.adjustmentData) {\n        if (event.adjustmentData.newScoreTeam !== undefined) state.teamPoints = event.adjustmentData.newScoreTeam;\n        if (event.adjustmentData.newScoreOpponent !== undefined) state.opponentPoints = event.adjustmentData.newScoreOpponent;\n        continue;\n    }\n\n    // --- 4. GAME ACTIONS ---\n    if (event.eventType === 'game' && event.outcome) {\n        // If set is already finished, ignore game events until set_start\n        if (state.isSetFinished) continue;\n\n        const impact = getImpact(event.outcome);\n\n        if (impact === 'point_for_us') {\n            state.teamPoints++;\n            \n            // SIDE-OUT LOGIC:\n            // We only rotate if we win a point while NOT serving.\n            if (state.servingSide === 'them') {\n                state.currentLineup = rotateLineup(state.currentLineup);\n                state.servingSide = 'us';\n            }\n            // If we were serving, we keep serving (no rotation).\n        } \n        else if (impact === 'point_for_them') {\n            state.opponentPoints++;\n            state.servingSide = 'them'; \n            // We assume opponent rotates if they side-out, but we don't track their lineup.\n        }\n\n        // Check Set End Condition immediately after point\n        const winner = checkSetWin(state.teamPoints, state.opponentPoints, state.currentSet);\n        if (winner) {\n            state.isSetFinished = true;\n            state.setWinner = winner;\n            if (winner === 'us') state.setsWonUs++;\n            else state.setsWonThem++;\n        }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return state;\n};\n"
migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-01-13T16:24:38.624Z.json:            }

Static Data\n  const [match, setMatch] = useState<Match | null>(null);\n  const [players, setPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);\n  const [initialLineup, setInitialLineup] = useState<MatchLineup | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // 2. Event Log (The Source of Truth)\n  const [eventLog, setEventLog] = useState<GameEvent[]>([]);\n\n  // 3. UI Selection State\n  const [selectedPlayerId, setSelectedPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [selectedFundamental, setSelectedFundamental] = useState<Fundamental | null>(null);\n  const [selectedOutcome, setSelectedOutcome] = useState<OutcomeCode | null>(null);\n  const [isSubMode, setIsSubMode] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedBenchPlayerId, setSelectedBenchPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // --- INITIAL LOAD ---\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const init = async () => {\n       try {\n           const [matches, teamPlayers, initLineup] = await Promise.all([\n               getMatches('t1'),\n               getTeamPlayers('t1'),\n               getInitialLineupForMatch(matchId)\n           ]);\n           const m = matches.find(x => x.id === matchId);\n           setMatch(m || null);\n           setPlayers(teamPlayers);\n           setInitialLineup(initLineup);\n           \n           // Load initial events from store\n           const storedEvents = eventStore.getEvents(matchId);\n           setEventLog(storedEvents);\n\n       } catch (error) {\n           showToast('error', 'Errore', 'Impossibile caricare i dati del match.');\n       } finally {\n           setLoading(false);\n       }\n    };\n    init();\n  }, [matchId]);\n\n  // --- ENGINE STATE DERIVATION ---\n  // This runs whenever eventLog changes. Pure calculation.\n  const matchState = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!initialLineup || !match) return null;\n    \n    return reduceMatchState(eventLog, initialLineup, {\n        matchIsHome: match.isHome\n    });\n  }, [eventLog, initialLineup, match]);\n\n  // Derived Helpers\n  const playersById = useMemo(() => {\n      const map: Record<string, { position: PlayerPosition, data: Player }> = {};\n      players.forEach(p => map[p.id] = { position: p.position, data: p });\n      return map;\n  }, [players]);\n\n  // --- HANDLERS ---\n\n  const handleRecordEvent = () => {\n    if (!selectedPlayerId || !selectedFundamental || !selectedOutcome || !match || !matchState) return;\n    \n    // Create Atomic Event\n    const newEvent: GameEvent = {\n        id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n        matchId: match.id,\n        eventType: 'game',\n        playerId: selectedPlayerId,\n        setNumber: matchState.currentSet, // Context from state\n        fundamental: selectedFundamental,\n        outcome: selectedOutcome,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        isImportantPoint: matchState.teamPoints > 20 || matchState.opponentPoints > 20,\n    };\n\n    // Persistence & State Update\n    const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, newEvent);\n    setEventLog(newLog);\n\n    // UI Feedback\n    if (selectedOutcome.includes('ace')) showToast('success', 'ACE!');\n    if (selectedOutcome.includes('block_point')) showToast('success', 'MONSTER BLOCK!');\n    if (selectedOutcome.includes('attack_point')) showToast('success', 'KILL!');\n\n    // Reset UI\n    setSelectedFundamental(null);\n    setSelectedOutcome(null);\n    setSelectedPlayerId(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubExecute = (courtPlayerId: string) => {\n      if (!isSubMode || !selectedBenchPlayerId || !matchState || !match) return;\n      \n      const subEvent: GameEvent = {\n        id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n        matchId: match.id,\n        eventType: 'sub',\n        setNumber: matchState.currentSet,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        subInPlayerId: selectedBenchPlayerId,\n        subOutPlayerId: courtPlayerId\n      };\n\n      const newLog = ricalcolato.');\n  };\n\n  const handleNextSet = () => {\n      if (!match || !matchState) return;\n      \n      const newEvent: GameEvent = {\n          id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n          matchId: match.id,\n          eventType: 'set_start',\n          setNumber: matchState.currentSet + 1,\n          timestamp: Date.now()\n      };\n      \n      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, newEvent);\n      setEventLog(newLog);\n      showToast('success', `Inizio Set ${matchState.currentSet + 1}`);\n  };\n\n  // --- RENDER HELPERS ---\n\n  if (loading || !matchState || !match) return <div className=\"h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl animate-pulse\">CARICAMENTO CAMPO...</div>;\n\n  const getGridArea = (pos: CourtPosition) => {\n      switch(pos) {\n          case 4: return 'row-start-1 col-start-1';\n          case 3: return 'row-start-1 col-start-2';\n          case 2: return 'row-start-1 col-start-3';\n          case 5: return 'row-start-2 col-start-1';\n          case 6: return 'row-start-2 col-start-2';\n          case 1: return 'row-start-2 col-start-3';\n      }\n  };\n\n  const isActionAllowed = (player: Player, fundamental: Fundamental, courtPos: CourtPosition): boolean => {\n    if (player.position === PlayerPosition.LIBERO) {\n        if (fundamental === Fundamental.SERVE) return false;\n        if (fundamental === Fundamental.BLOCK) return false;\n        if (fundamental === Fundamental.ATTACK && [2,3,4].includes(courtPos)) return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div },\n];\n\nconst load = <T>(key: string, defaultVal: T): T => {\n  try {\n    const item = localStorage.getItem(key);\n    return item ? JSON.parse(item) : defaultVal;\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(`Error loading ${key}`, e);\n    return defaultVal;\n  }\n};\n\nconst save = <T>(key: string, data: T) => {\n  try {\n    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(`Error saving ${key}`, e);\n  }\n};\n\nif (!localStorage.getItem(KEY_INIT)) {\n  save(KEY_PLAYERS, SEED_PLAYERS);\n  save(KEY_MATCHES, SEED_MATCHES);\n  save(KEY_LINEUPS, []);\n  localStorage.setItem(KEY_INIT, 'true');\n}\n\n// --- PLAYER SERVICES ---\nexport const getTeamPlayers = async (teamId: string): Promise<Player[]> => {\n  return new Promise(resolve => {\n    const all = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n    setTimeout(() => resolve(all), 200);\n  });\n};\n\nexport const updatePlayer = async (updated: Player): Promise<Player> => {\n  return new Promise(resolve => {\n    const all = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n    const index = all.findIndex(p => p.id === updated.id);\n    if (index >= 0) {\n      all[index] = { ...all[index], ...updated };\n    } else {\n      all.push(updated);\n    }\n    save(KEY_PLAYERS, all);\n    setTimeout(() => resolve(updated), 200);\n  });\n};\n\nexport const createPlayer = async (newPlayer: Omit<Player, 'id' | 'averageRating' | 'matchesPlayed'>): Promise<Player> => {\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\n        const all = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n        const player: Player = {\n            ...newPlayer,\n            id: generateId(),\n            averageRating: 6.0,\n            matchesPlayed: 0,\n            trend: 'stable'\n        };\n        all.push(player);\n        save(KEY_PLAYERS, all);\n        setTimeout(() => resolve(player), 200);\n    });\n};\n\n// --- MATCH SERVICES ---\nexport const getMatches = async (teamId: string): Promise<Match[]> => {\n  return new Promise(resolve => {\n    const all = load<Match[]>(KEY_MATCHES, []);\n    all.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());\n    setTimeout(() => resolve(all), 200);\n  });\n};\n\nexport const createMatch = async (matchData: Omit<Match, 'id' | 'status'>): Promise<Match> => {\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\n        const all = load<Match[]>(KEY_MATCHES, []);\n        const newMatch: Match = {\n            ...matchData,\n            id: generateId(),\n            status: 'scheduled'\n        };\n        all.unshift(newMatch); \n        save(KEY_MATCHES, all);\n        setTimeout(() => resolve(newMatch), 200);\n    });\n};\n\nexport const getPlayerMatches = async (playerId: string): Promise<Match[]> => {\n    const matches = load<Match[]>(KEY_MATCHES, []);\n    // Logic to check participation could be added here by checking event logs\n    return matches.filter(m => m.status === 'completed');\n};\n\n// --- STATS SERVICES ---\nexport const getLeaderboard = async (filters: any): Promise<Player[]> => {\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\n        const players = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n        let sorted = [...players];\n        if (filters.role && filters.role !== 'all') sorted = sorted.filter(p => p.position === filters.role);\n        if (filters.region && filters.region !== 'all') sorted = sorted.filter(p => p.region === filters.region);\n        sorted.sort((a, b) => b.averageRating - a.averageRating);\n        setTimeout(() => resolve(sorted), 300);\n    });\n};\n\nexport const getPlayerMatchStatsForPlayer = async (playerId: string): Promise<PlayerMatchStats[]> => {\n  return new Promise(async (resolve) => {\n      const result: PlayerMatchStats[] = [];\n      const players = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n      const player = players.find((p) => p.id === playerId);\n      if (!player) { resolve([]); return; }\n      const allMatches = load<Match[]>(KEY_MATCHES, []);\n      \n      for (const match of allMatches) {\n        // Retrieve events using the new store\n        const evForMatch = eventStore.getEvents(match.id).filter(ev => ev.playerId === playerId && ev.eventType === 'game');\n        \n        if (evForMatch.length === 0) continue;\n\n        const ratingResult = computeVolleyRating(evForMatch, { role: player.position });\n        let attacks = 0, attackPoints = 0, attackErrors = 0;\n        let serves = 0, aces = 0, serveErrors = 0;\n        let receptions = 0, perfectReceptions = 0, negativeReceptions = 0;\n        let blocks = 0, blockPoints = 0, digs = 0;\n\n        for (const ev of evForMatch) {\n          if (!ev.fundamental || !ev.outcome) continue;\n          switch (ev.fundamental) {\n            case Fundamental.ATTACK:\n              attacks++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'attack_point' || ev.outcome === 'attack_tool') attackPoints++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'attack_error' || ev.outcome === 'attack_blocked') attackErrors++;\n              break;\n            case Fundamental.SERVE:\n              serves++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'serve_ace') aces++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'serve_error') serveErrors++;\n              break;\n            case Fundamental.RECEPTION:\n              receptions++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'reception_perfect') perfectReceptions++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'reception_negative' || ev.outcome === 'reception_ace_conceded' || ev.outcome === 'reception_slash') negativeReceptions++;\n              break;\n            case Fundamental.BLOCK:\n              blocks++;\n              if (ev.outcome === 'block_point') blockPoints++;\n              break;\n            case Fundamental.DEFENSE:\n              if (ev.outcome === 'defense_great' || ev.outcome === 'defense_ok' || ev.outcome === 'defense_cover') digs++;\n              break;\n          }\n        }\n        \n        result.push({\n          id: `s_${match.id}_${playerId}`,\n          matchId: match.id,\n          playerId,\n          teamId: player.teamId,\n          rating: ratingResult.rating,\n          breakdown: ratingResult.breakdown,\n          totalPoints: attackPoints + aces + blockPoints,\n          errors: attackErrors + serveErrors,\n          matchDate: match.date,\n          opponentName: match.opponentName, \n          totals: {\n            attacks, attackPoints, attackErrors,\n            serves, aces, serveErrors,\n            receptions, perfectReceptions, negativeReceptions,\n            blocks, blockPoints, digs,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n      setTimeout(() => resolve(result), 300);\n  });\n};\n\n// --- LINEUP INIT (Still used for initial setup, subsequent states derived from events) ---\nexport const getInitialLineupForMatch = async (matchId: string): Promise<MatchLineup | null> => {\n    const lineups = load<MatchLineup[]>(KEY_LINEUPS, []);\n    const stored = lineups.find(l => l.matchId === matchId);\n    \n    if (stored) return stored;\n\n    const players = load<Player[]>(KEY_PLAYERS, []);\n    const starters = players.slice(0, 6);\n    const bench = players.slice(6);\n\n    const newLineup: MatchLineup = {\n        id: `l_${matchId}_init`,\n        matchId: matchId,\n        setNumber: 1,\n        rotationIndex: 0,\n        liberoId: bench.find(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.LIBERO)?.id,\n        onCourt: starters.map((p, i) => ({ position: (i + 1) as CourtPosition, playerId: p.id })),\n        benchPlayerIds: bench.map(p => p.id)\n    };\n    \n    lineups.push(newLineup);\n    save(KEY_LINEUPS, lineups);\n\n    return newLineup;\n};\n"

Colma il divario tra i complessi software professionali (costosi e difficili da usare) e i semplici segnapunti cartacei.\n\nLa sua filosofia si basa su due pilastri: **Gamification** (per i giocatori) e **Resilienza Operativa** (per lo staff).\n\n---\n\n### ✨ Le Peculiarità (Unique Selling Points)\n\n1.  **Rating Algoritmico in Tempo Reale (Gamification)**\n    *   Non si limita a contare i punti. Ogni azione (un attacco vincente, un errore in battuta, una ricezione perfetta) contribuisce a un **Voto da 1 a 10** calcolato in tempo reale.\n    *   I giocatori vedono la loro prestazione come in un videogioco (stile FIFA/FC24), con trend di crescita e badge.\n\n2.  **Scouting \"Visuale\" & Rule-Aware**\n    *   Niente codici da digitare. L'interfaccia è una **rappresentazione visiva del campo**.\n    *   **Intelligenza delle Regole:** Il sistema sa che si ruota solo al *Side-Out* (cambio palla). Sa che il Libero non può battere. Questo riduce drasticamente gli errori umani durante la partita frenetica.\n\n3.  **Architettura \"Time-Travel\" (Event Sourcing)**\n    *   **Novità:** L'app non salva \"il punteggio\", ma \"la storia\". Ogni click è un evento immutabile.\n    *   **Vantaggio:** Se sbagli, l'Undo non fa una semplice sottrazione, ma *riavvolge il tempo* e ricalcola tutto (rotazioni, punteggio, chi è in battuta) garantendo coerenza matematica assoluta.\n\n---\n\n### 🛠 Funzionalità Chiave\n\n#### Per lo Staff (Coach & Scoutman)\n*   **Match Dashboard:** Panoramica delle partite programmate, live e terminate.\n*   **Interfaccia Scouting (La \"Console\"):**\n    *   **Scoreboard Gigante:** Punteggio sempre visibile con indicatore chiaro di chi è al servizio.\n    *   **Campo Interattivo:** Griglia 2x3 per selezionare chi compie l'azione. Rotazioni automatiche visualizzate in tempo reale.\n    *   **Gestione Panchina:** Sostituzioni rapide con drag-and-drop o click (gestite come eventi nel log).\n    *   **Input Rapido:** Flusso a 3 tap: *Chi* (Giocatore) -> *Cosa* (Fondamentale) -> *Esito* (Punto/Errore/Neutro).\n    *   **Feedback Immediato:** Toast notification per eventi chiave (ACE!, MONSTER BLOCK!).\n\n#### Per i Giocatori\n*   **Player Profile:** Una scheda personale con avatar, numero di maglia e statistiche aggregate.\n*   **Trend Analysis:** Grafico a linea che mostra l'andamento del proprio Rating nelle ultime partite.\n*   **Statistiche Dettagliate:** Breakdown per fondamentale (es. % Ricezione perfetta, Efficienza Attacco).\n*   **Leaderboards:** Classifiche globali o regionali filtrabili per ruolo (es. \"Miglior Schiacciatore in Lombardia\").\n\n---\n\n### 🏗 Tech Stack & Architettura (Sotto il cofano)\n\nL'app è stata rifattorizzata per essere \"a prova di palestra\" (zone con poca connessione ed errori frequenti).\n\n*   **Frontend:** React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS (Design System \"Pastel Pop\").\n*   **State Management:** **Event Sourcing Engine pura**.\n    *   Lo stato della partita (`DerivedMatchState`) viene calcolato riducendo un array di eventi (`GameEvent[]`).\n    *   Non esiste uno stato \"corrotto\": se i dati sono strani, basta correggere l'evento nel passato e il presente si aggiusta da solo.\n*   **Offline-First:**\n    *   Utilizza un layer di astrazione `eventStore` su `LocalStorage`.\n    *   I dati sono persistenti: se chiudi il browser o ricarichi la pagina durante il 4° set sul 24-24, l'app si riapre esattamente in quel momento, con le rotazioni corrette.\n*   **Sicurezza Dati:**\n    *   Utilizzo di `crypto.randomUUID()` per prevenire collisioni di ID.\n    *   Separazione netta tra logica di dominio (`matchEngine.ts`) e interfaccia utente.\n\n### 🎨 Identità Visiva (UX/UI)\n\n*   **Palette \"Sport Pop\":** Colori pastello ma ad alto contrasto (Crema, Navy, Lime, Terracotta, Teal).\n*   **Design \"Chunky\":** Bottoni grandi, bordi spessi, ombre \"cartoon\". Fatto apposta per essere usato su tablet con dita sudate o tremolanti.\n*   **Accessibilità:** Font leggibili (*Bebas Neue* per i titoli, *Inter* per i dati), alto contrasto sugli elementi attivi.\n\nIn sintesi, **VolleyRank** trasforma il foglio di carta dello scout in uno strumento potente, resiliente e divertente, pronto per l'uso in campo.",

supabase_schema.sql:  name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
supabase_schema.sql:  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('club_admin', 'staff', 'player')),
supabase_schema.sql:  player_id UUID,
supabase_schema.sql:  club_id UUID NOT NULL
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Clubs
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE clubs (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  city TEXT NOT NULL
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Teams
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE teams (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  club_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES clubs(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  category TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  gender TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (gender IN ('M', 'F'))
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Players
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE players (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  team_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES teams(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  club_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES clubs(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  first_name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  last_name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  position TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  shirt_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  height INTEGER,
supabase_schema.sql:  avatar_url TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  average_rating NUMERIC DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  region TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  category TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  matches_played INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  trend TEXT CHECK (trend IN ('up', 'down', 'stable'))
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Matches
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE matches (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  team_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES teams(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  club_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES clubs(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  opponent_name TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  location TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  is_home BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  competition TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('scheduled', 'live', 'completed')),
supabase_schema.sql:  result TEXT
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Game Events
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE game_events (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  match_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES matches(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  timestamp BIGINT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  set_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  player_id UUID REFERENCES players(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  fundamental TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  outcome TEXT,
supabase_schema.sql:  sub_in_player_id UUID REFERENCES players(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  sub_out_player_id UUID REFERENCES players(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  is_important_point BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
supabase_schema.sql:  is_decisive_point BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
supabase_schema.sql:  starting_lineup JSONB,
supabase_schema.sql:  adjustment_data JSONB
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Lineups
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE lineups (
supabase_schema.sql:  match_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES matches(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  set_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  rotation_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  on_court JSONB NOT NULL,
supabase_schema.sql:  libero_id UUID REFERENCES players(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  bench_player_ids JSONB NOT NULL
supabase_schema.sql:);
supabase_schema.sql:
supabase_schema.sql:-- Player Match Stats
supabase_schema.sql:CREATE TABLE player_match_stats (
supabase_schema.sql:  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
supabase_schema.sql:  player_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES players(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  match_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES matches(id),
supabase_schema.sql:  attacks INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  attack_points INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  attack_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  serves INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  serve_points INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  serve_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  blocks INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  block_points INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  block_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  receptions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  reception_perfect INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  reception_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  digs INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  dig_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  sets INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  set_errors INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
supabase_schema.sql:  overall_rating NUMERIC DEFAULT 0
supabase_schema.sql:);

pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:import { Player, PlayerMatchStats, Match, User } from '../types';
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:import { getPlayerMatchStats, getMatches, getTeamPlayers } from '../services/dbService';
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:import { ResponsiveContainer, LineChart, CartesianGrid, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, Line, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar } from 'recharts';
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:interface PlayerProfileProps {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  user: User;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  playerId: string;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  onNavigate?: (path: string) => void;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:}
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:export const PlayerProfile: React.FC<PlayerProfileProps> = ({ user, playerId, onNavigate }) => {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const [player, setPlayer] = useState<Player | null>(null);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const [matches, setMatches] = useState<Match[]>([]);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const [stats, setStats] = useState<PlayerMatchStats[]>([]);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(true);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    let isMounted = true;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    const load = async () => {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      setIsLoading(true);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      try {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        if (!user.clubId) return;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        // Fetch player details first
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        const allPlayers = await getTeamPlayers('t1', user.clubId);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        const foundPlayer = allPlayers.find(p => p.id === playerId);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        if (foundPlayer && isMounted) {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:            setPlayer(foundPlayer);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:            const [m, s] = await Promise.all([
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                getMatches('t1', user.clubId),
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                getPlayerMatchStats(playerId),
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:            ]);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:            if (isMounted) {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                // Filter matches to only those the player participated in based on stats
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                const playedMatchIds = new Set(s.map(stat => stat.matchId));
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                setMatches(m.filter(match => playedMatchIds.has(match.id) && match.status === 'completed'));
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:                setStats(s);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:            }
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        }
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      } finally {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:        if (isMounted) setIsLoading(false);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      }
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    };
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    load();
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    return () => {
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      isMounted = false;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:    };
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  }, [playerId, user.clubId]);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  if (isLoading) return <div className="text-center py-12 font-display text-2xl animate-pulse">Loading Profile...</div>;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  if (!player) return <div className="text-center py-12 font-display text-2xl text-red-500">Player Not Found</div>;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  // Format data for Recharts
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const chartData = stats.map((s, i) => ({
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      name: `M${i+1}`,
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      date: s.matchDate ? new Date(s.matchDate).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { month: 'short', day: 'numeric'}) : `Match ${i+1}`,
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      rating: s.rating
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  }));
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalAttacks = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.attacks, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalAttackPoints = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.attackPoints, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalAttackErrors = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.attackErrors, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const attackEff = totalAttacks > 0 ? ((totalAttackPoints - totalAttackErrors) / totalAttacks) * 100 : 0;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalReceptions = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.receptions, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalPerfectReceptions = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.perfectReceptions, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalNegativeReceptions = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.negativeReceptions, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const recEff = totalReceptions > 0 ? ((totalPerfectReceptions - totalNegativeReceptions) / totalReceptions) * 100 : 0;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalServes = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.serves, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalAces = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.aces, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalServeErrors = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.serveErrors, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const serveEff = totalServes > 0 ? ((totalAces - totalServeErrors) / totalServes) * 100 : 0;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalBlocks = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.blocks, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalBlockPoints = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.blockPoints, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const blockEff = totalBlocks > 0 ? (totalBlockPoints / totalBlocks) * 100 : 0;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const totalDigs = stats.reduce((acc, s) => acc + s.totals.digs, 0);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const avgDigs = matches.length > 0 ? totalDigs / matches.length : 0;
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:  const digScore = Math.min((avgDigs / 10) * 100, 100);
pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:

pages/PlayerProfile.tsx:      { subject: 'Attack', A: Math.max(0, attackEff), fullMark: 100 },

pages/Teams.tsx:
pages/Teams.tsx:import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
pages/Teams.tsx:import { Player, PlayerPosition, User } from '../types';
pages/Teams.tsx:import { getTeamPlayers, updatePlayer, createPlayer, generateId } from '../services/dbService';
pages/Teams.tsx:import { Button } from '../components/ui/Buttons';
pages/Teams.tsx:
pages/Teams.tsx:interface TeamsProps {
pages/Teams.tsx:  user: User;
pages/Teams.tsx:  showToast: (type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info', title: string, message?: string) => void;
pages/Teams.tsx:  onNavigate: (path: string) => void;
pages/Teams.tsx:}
pages/Teams.tsx:
pages/Teams.tsx:export const Teams: React.FC<TeamsProps> = ({ user, showToast, onNavigate }) => {
pages/Teams.tsx:    const [teamPlayers, setTeamPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);
pages/Teams.tsx:    const [editingPlayer, setEditingPlayer] = useState<Player | null>(null);
pages/Teams.tsx:    const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
pages/Teams.tsx:    const [isAddingNew, setIsAddingNew] = useState(false);
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
pages/Teams.tsx:      if (user.clubId) {
pages/Teams.tsx:          getTeamPlayers('t1', user.clubId).then(setTeamPlayers);
pages/Teams.tsx:      }
pages/Teams.tsx:    }, [user.clubId]);
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:    const handleEditChange = (field: keyof Player, value: string) => {
pages/Teams.tsx:      if (!editingPlayer) return;
pages/Teams.tsx:      let updated: Player = { ...editingPlayer };
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:      if (field === 'shirtNumber') {
pages/Teams.tsx:        updated.shirtNumber = parseInt(value || '0', 10);
pages/Teams.tsx:      } else if (field === 'position') {
pages/Teams.tsx:        updated.position = value as PlayerPosition;
pages/Teams.tsx:      } else {
pages/Teams.tsx:        (updated as any)[field] = value;
pages/Teams.tsx:      }
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:      setEditingPlayer(updated);
pages/Teams.tsx:    };
pages/Teams.tsx:
pages/Teams.tsx:    const handleCreateNewClick = () => {
pages/Teams.tsx:        if (!user.clubId) return;
pages/Teams.tsx:        const newP: Player = {
pages/Teams.tsx:            id: generateId(), // temp
pages/Teams.tsx:            teamId: 't1',
pages/Teams.tsx:            clubId: user.clubId,
pages/Teams.tsx:            firstName: '',
pages/Teams.tsx:            lastName: '',
pages/Teams.tsx:            position: PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER,
pages/Teams.tsx:            shirtNumber: 0,
pages/Teams.tsx:            averageRating: 6.0,
pages/Teams.tsx:            matchesPlayed: 0,
pages/Teams.tsx:            region: 'Lombardia',
pages/Teams.tsx:            category: 'U19'
pages/Teams.tsx:        };
pages/Teams.tsx:        setEditingPlayer(newP);
pages/Teams.tsx:        setIsAddingNew(true);
pages/Teams.tsx:    };
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:    const handleSavePlayer = async () => {
pages/Teams.tsx:      if (!editingPlayer) return;
pages/Teams.tsx:      setIsSaving(true);
pages/Teams.tsx:      try {
pages/Teams.tsx:        if (isAddingNew) {
pages/Teams.tsx:            const created = await createPlayer(editingPlayer);
pages/Teams.tsx:            setTeamPlayers(prev => [...prev, created]);
pages/Teams.tsx:            showToast('success', 'Player Added', `${created.firstName} joined the team.`);
pages/Teams.tsx:        } else {
pages/Teams.tsx:            const saved = await updatePlayer(editingPlayer);
pages/Teams.tsx:            setTeamPlayers((prev) =>
pages/Teams.tsx:            prev.map((p) => (p.id === saved.id ? saved : p))
pages/Teams.tsx:            );
pages/Teams.tsx:            showToast('success', 'Player Updated', `${saved.firstName} updated.`);
pages/Teams.tsx:        }
pages/Teams.tsx:        setEditingPlayer(null);
pages/Teams.tsx:        setIsAddingNew(false);
pages/Teams.tsx:      } catch (e) {
pages/Teams.tsx:        showToast('error', 'Error', 'Failed to save player');
pages/Teams.tsx:      } finally {
pages/Teams.tsx:        setIsSaving(false);
pages/Teams.tsx:      }
pages/Teams.tsx:    };
pages/Teams.tsx:  
pages/Teams.tsx:    const groupedPlayers = {
pages/Teams.tsx:        [PlayerPosition.SETTER]: teamPlayers.filter(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.SETTER),
pages/Teams.tsx:        [PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER]: teamPlayers.filter(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.OUTSIDE_HITTER),
pages/Teams.tsx:        [PlayerPosition.OPPOSITE]: teamPlayers.filter(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.OPPOSITE),
pages/Teams.tsx:        [PlayerPosition.MIDDLE_BLOCKER]: teamPlayers.filter(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.MIDDLE_BLOCKER),
pages/Teams.tsx:        [PlayerPosition.LIBERO]: teamPlayers.filter(p => p.position === PlayerPosition.LIBERO),
pages/Teams.tsx:    };
pages/Teams.tsx:

pages/Teams.tsx:          <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6 border-b-2 border-black/10 pb-4">

pages/Teams.tsx:          </div>

pages/Teams.tsx:          <div className="space-y-10">
pages/Teams.tsx:            {Object.entries(groupedPlayers).map(([role, players]) => {
pages/Teams.tsx:                if (players.length === 0) return null;
pages/Teams.tsx:                return (

pages/Teams.tsx:                            </span>

pages/Teams.tsx:                        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
pages/Teams.tsx:                            {players.map((p) => (
pages/Teams.tsx:                            <div
pages/Teams.tsx:                                key={p.id}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                className="bg-white p-4 border-2 border-black rounded-card shadow-cartoon flex flex-col gap-3 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-cartoon-hover transition-all duration-300"
pages/Teams.tsx:                            >
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-display text-2xl border-2 border-black ${roleColors[role] || 'bg-gray-200'}`}>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    {p.shirtNumber}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    <div className="font-title text-2xl leading-none">
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    {p.firstName} {p.lastName}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    <div className="text-xs uppercase text-black/50 font-soft font-bold mt-1">
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    {p.category} • {p.region}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                
pages/Teams.tsx:                                {typeof p.averageRating === 'number' && (
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-soft bg-cream-light p-2 rounded border border-black/10 mt-2">
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    <span className="text-black/70 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Season Avg</span>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    <span className={`border-2 border-black rounded-lg px-2 py-[2px] font-title text-lg ${p.averageRating >= 7.5 ? 'bg-lime' : 'bg-white'}`}>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    {p.averageRating.toFixed(1)}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    </span>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                )}
pages/Teams.tsx:                
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <div className="mt-2 flex gap-2">
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <Button
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    size="sm"
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    variant="secondary"

pages/Teams.tsx:                                    }}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                >
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    Stats
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </Button>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                <Button
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    size="sm"
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    className="flex-1"
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    onClick={() => { setIsAddingNew(false); setEditingPlayer(p); }}
pages/Teams.tsx:                                >
pages/Teams.tsx:                                    Edit
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </Button>
pages/Teams.tsx:                                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                            </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                            ))}
pages/Teams.tsx:                        </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                    </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                );
pages/Teams.tsx:            })}
pages/Teams.tsx:          </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:        </div>

pages/Teams.tsx:        {/* EDIT SIDEBAR */}
pages/Teams.tsx:        {editingPlayer && (

pages/Teams.tsx:                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
pages/Teams.tsx:                    <h2 className="font-title text-4xl text-teal">{isAddingNew ? 'NEW PLAYER' : 'EDIT PLAYER'}</h2>

pages/Teams.tsx:                </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:
pages/Teams.tsx:                <div className="space-y-5">
pages/Teams.tsx:                    <div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                        <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-1 text-black/70">First Name</label>
pages/Teams.tsx:                        <input 
pages/Teams.tsx:                            className="w-full border-2 border-black rounded-lg p-3 font-soft focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-lime"
pages/Teams.tsx:                            value={editingPlayer.firstName}
pages/Teams.tsx:                            onChange={(e) => handleEditChange('firstName', e.target.value)}
pages/Teams.tsx:                        />
pages/Teams.tsx:                    </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                    <div>

pages/Teams.tsx:                        />
pages/Teams.tsx:                    </div>

pages/Teams.tsx:                        <div>

pages/Teams.tsx:                            />
pages/Teams.tsx:                        </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:                        <div>

pages/Teams.tsx:                                onChange={(e) => handleEditChange('position', e.target.value)}

pages/Teams.tsx:                                {Object.values(PlayerPosition).map(pos => (

pages/Teams.tsx:                    </div>

pages/Teams.tsx:                        </Button>
pages/Teams.tsx:                    </div>

pages/Teams.tsx:            </div>
pages/Teams.tsx:        )}

pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
pages/Dashboard.tsx:import { User, UserRole, Match } from '../types';
pages/Dashboard.tsx:import { Button } from '../components/ui/Buttons';
pages/Dashboard.tsx:import { getMatches, createMatch, generateId } from '../services/dbService';
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:interface DashboardProps {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  user: User;
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  onNavigate: (path: string) => void;
pages/Dashboard.tsx:}
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:export const Dashboard: React.FC<DashboardProps> = ({ user, onNavigate }) => {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const [matches, setMatches] = useState<Match[]>([]);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  // New Match Modal State
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const [showCreateMatch, setShowCreateMatch] = useState(false);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const [newMatchData, setNewMatchData] = useState({
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      opponentName: '',
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      competition: 'Friendly',
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      isHome: true,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      location: 'Home Court'
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  });
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:    if (user.clubId) {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:        getMatches('t1', user.clubId).then(data => {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            setMatches(data);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            setLoading(false);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:        });
pages/Dashboard.tsx:    } else {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:        setLoading(false);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:    }
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [user.clubId]);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const handleCreateMatch = async () => {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      if (!newMatchData.opponentName || !user.clubId) return;
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      try {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          const match = await createMatch({
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              id: generateId(),
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              teamId: 't1',
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              clubId: user.clubId,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              opponentName: newMatchData.opponentName,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              date: newMatchData.date,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              competition: newMatchData.competition,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              isHome: newMatchData.isHome,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              location: newMatchData.location,
pages/Dashboard.tsx:              status: 'scheduled'
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          });
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          setMatches(prev => [match, ...prev]); // Add to top
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          setShowCreateMatch(false);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          // Reset form
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          setNewMatchData({ opponentName: '', date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], competition: 'Friendly', isHome: true, location: 'Home Court' });
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      } catch (e) {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          alert('Errore durante la creazione del match. Riprova.');
pages/Dashboard.tsx:          console.error(e);
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      }
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  };
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const nextMatch = matches.find(m => m.status === 'scheduled');
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  const pastMatches = matches.filter(m => m.status === 'completed');
pages/Dashboard.tsx:
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  // PLAYER VIEW (Unchanged basically)
pages/Dashboard.tsx:  if (user.role === UserRole.PLAYER) {
pages/Dashboard.tsx:      return (
pages/Dashboard.tsx:        <div className="space-y-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            <header className="border-b-2 border-black/10 pb-6">

pages/Dashboard.tsx:                <p className="text-lg text-terracotta font-medium">Hello, {user.name}</p>
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            </header>
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            
pages/Dashboard.tsx:             {/* Quick Actions */}
pages/Dashboard.tsx:            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                 <div className="space-y-4">
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                     <h2 className="font-display text-3xl">YOUR CAREER</h2>
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                     <div 
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                        className="bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl p-8 shadow-cartoon hover:shadow-cartoon-hover hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                        onClick={() => onNavigate(`/players/${user.playerId || 'p1'}`)}
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                     >
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                         <span className="text-4xl mb-4 block">👤</span>
pages/Dashboard.tsx:                         <h3 className="font-bold text-2xl group-hover:text-teal transition-colors">View Full Profile</h3>

pages/Dashboard.tsx:                </div>

pages/Scouting.tsx:export const Scouting: React.FC<ScoutingProps> = ({ matchId, user, onFinished, showToast }) => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // 1. Static Data
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [match, setMatch] = useState<Match | null>(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [players, setPlayers] = useState<Player[]>([]);

pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // 2. Event Log (The Source of Truth)
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [eventLog, setEventLog] = useState<GameEvent[]>([]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // 3. UI Selection State
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [selectedPlayerId, setSelectedPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [selectedFundamental, setSelectedFundamental] = useState<Fundamental | null>(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [selectedOutcome, setSelectedOutcome] = useState<OutcomeCode | null>(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [isSubMode, setIsSubMode] = useState(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [selectedBenchPlayerId, setSelectedBenchPlayerId] = useState<string | null>(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // 4. Tools & Modals
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [showTools, setShowTools] = useState(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [showScoreModal, setShowScoreModal] = useState(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [showLiveStats, setShowLiveStats] = useState(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [manualScoreUs, setManualScoreUs] = useState(0);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const [manualScoreThem, setManualScoreThem] = useState(0);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // --- INITIAL LOAD ---
pages/Scouting.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:    const init = async () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:       try {
pages/Scouting.tsx:           if (!user.clubId) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:           const [matches, teamPlayers, initLineup] = await Promise.all([
pages/Scouting.tsx:               getMatches('t1', user.clubId),
pages/Scouting.tsx:               getTeamPlayers('t1', user.clubId),
pages/Scouting.tsx:               getInitialLineupForMatch(matchId)
pages/Scouting.tsx:           ]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           const m = matches.find(x => x.id === matchId);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           setMatch(m || null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           setPlayers(teamPlayers);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           
pages/Scouting.tsx:           let finalLineup = initLineup;
pages/Scouting.tsx:           if (!finalLineup && teamPlayers.length >= 6) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:               // Auto-generate a default lineup for prototype
pages/Scouting.tsx:               finalLineup = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   matchId,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   setNumber: 1,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   rotationIndex: 0,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   onCourt: [
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 1, playerId: teamPlayers[0].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 2, playerId: teamPlayers[1].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 3, playerId: teamPlayers[2].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 4, playerId: teamPlayers[3].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 5, playerId: teamPlayers[4].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                       { position: 6, playerId: teamPlayers[5].id },
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   ],
pages/Scouting.tsx:                   benchPlayerIds: teamPlayers.slice(6).map(p => p.id)
pages/Scouting.tsx:               };
pages/Scouting.tsx:           }
pages/Scouting.tsx:           setInitialLineup(finalLineup);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           
pages/Scouting.tsx:           // Load initial events from store
pages/Scouting.tsx:           const storedEvents = await eventStore.loadEventsAsync(matchId);
pages/Scouting.tsx:           setEventLog(storedEvents);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:       } catch (error) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:           showToast('error', 'Errore', 'Impossibile caricare i dati del match.');
pages/Scouting.tsx:       } finally {
pages/Scouting.tsx:           setLoading(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:       }
pages/Scouting.tsx:    };
pages/Scouting.tsx:    init();
pages/Scouting.tsx:  }, [matchId, user.clubId]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // --- ENGINE STATE DERIVATION ---
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // This runs whenever eventLog changes. Pure calculation.
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const matchState = useMemo(() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (!initialLineup || !match) return null;
pages/Scouting.tsx:    
pages/Scouting.tsx:    return reduceMatchState(eventLog, initialLineup, {
pages/Scouting.tsx:        matchIsHome: match.isHome
pages/Scouting.tsx:    });
pages/Scouting.tsx:  }, [eventLog, initialLineup, match]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // Derived Helpers
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const playersById = useMemo(() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const map: Record<string, { position: PlayerPosition, data: Player }> = {};
pages/Scouting.tsx:      players.forEach(p => map[p.id] = { position: p.position, data: p });
pages/Scouting.tsx:      return map;
pages/Scouting.tsx:  }, [players]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const liveStats = useMemo(() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const stats: Record<string, { 
pages/Scouting.tsx:          points: number, 
pages/Scouting.tsx:          errors: number, 
pages/Scouting.tsx:          attacks: number, 
pages/Scouting.tsx:          attackPoints: number, 
pages/Scouting.tsx:          attackErrors: number,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          rating: number 
pages/Scouting.tsx:      }> = {};
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // Initialize
pages/Scouting.tsx:      players.forEach(p => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          stats[p.id] = { points: 0, errors: 0, attacks: 0, attackPoints: 0, attackErrors: 0, rating: 6.0 };
pages/Scouting.tsx:      });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // Group events by player
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const playerEvents: Record<string, GameEvent[]> = {};
pages/Scouting.tsx:      eventLog.forEach(ev => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          if (ev.playerId) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              if (!playerEvents[ev.playerId]) playerEvents[ev.playerId] = [];
pages/Scouting.tsx:              playerEvents[ev.playerId].push(ev);
pages/Scouting.tsx:          }
pages/Scouting.tsx:      });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // Calculate stats and rating
pages/Scouting.tsx:      players.forEach(p => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          const s = stats[p.id];
pages/Scouting.tsx:          const events = playerEvents[p.id] || [];
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:          events.forEach(ev => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              if (ev.outcome?.includes('point') || ev.outcome?.includes('ace') || ev.outcome === 'opponent_error') s.points++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:              if (ev.outcome?.includes('error') || ev.outcome?.includes('blocked') || ev.outcome?.includes('net_fault') || ev.outcome === 'opponent_point') s.errors++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:              
pages/Scouting.tsx:              if (ev.fundamental === 'attack') {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  s.attacks++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  if (ev.outcome === 'attack_point' || ev.outcome === 'attack_tool') s.attackPoints++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  if (ev.outcome === 'attack_error' || ev.outcome === 'attack_blocked') s.attackErrors++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:              }
pages/Scouting.tsx:          });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:          // Calculate Rating
pages/Scouting.tsx:          const ratingResult = computeVolleyRating(events, { role: p.position });
pages/Scouting.tsx:          s.rating = ratingResult.rating;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      return stats;
pages/Scouting.tsx:  }, [eventLog, players]);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // --- HANDLERS ---
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleRecordEvent = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (!selectedFundamental || !selectedOutcome || !match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:    
pages/Scouting.tsx:    // Allow recording without player ONLY for 'other' fundamental (generic points)
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (!selectedPlayerId && selectedFundamental !== Fundamental.OTHER) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:        showToast('error', 'Seleziona un giocatore', 'Devi selezionare un giocatore per questo fondamentale.');
pages/Scouting.tsx:        return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:    }
pages/Scouting.tsx:    
pages/Scouting.tsx:    // Create Atomic Event
pages/Scouting.tsx:    const newEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:        id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:        matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        eventType: 'game',
pages/Scouting.tsx:        playerId: selectedPlayerId || undefined, // Optional for generic events
pages/Scouting.tsx:        setNumber: matchState.currentSet, // Context from state
pages/Scouting.tsx:        fundamental: selectedFundamental,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        outcome: selectedOutcome,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        timestamp: Date.now(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:        isImportantPoint: matchState.teamPoints > 20 || matchState.opponentPoints > 20,
pages/Scouting.tsx:    };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:    // Persistence & State Update
pages/Scouting.tsx:    const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, newEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:    setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:    // UI Feedback
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (selectedOutcome.includes('ace')) showToast('success', 'ACE!');
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (selectedOutcome.includes('block_point')) showToast('success', 'MONSTER BLOCK!');
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (selectedOutcome.includes('attack_point')) showToast('success', 'KILL!');
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (selectedOutcome === 'opponent_error') showToast('success', 'PUNTO (Errore Avv.)');
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (selectedOutcome === 'opponent_point') showToast('info', 'Punto Avversario');
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:    // Reset UI
pages/Scouting.tsx:    setSelectedFundamental(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:    setSelectedOutcome(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:    setSelectedPlayerId(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleSubExecute = (courtPlayerId: string) => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!isSubMode || !selectedBenchPlayerId || !matchState || !match) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const subEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:        id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:        matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        eventType: 'sub',
pages/Scouting.tsx:        setNumber: matchState.currentSet,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        timestamp: Date.now(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:        subInPlayerId: selectedBenchPlayerId,
pages/Scouting.tsx:        subOutPlayerId: courtPlayerId
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, subEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setIsSubMode(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setSelectedBenchPlayerId(null);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('success', 'Cambio Effettuato');
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleUndo = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.undoLastEvent(matchId);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog([...newLog]); // Force new array ref
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('info', 'Annullato', 'Stato ricalcolato.');
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleTimeout = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const timeoutEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          eventType: 'timeout',
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setNumber: matchState.currentSet,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now()
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, timeoutEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('info', 'Timeout', 'Timeout registrato.');
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleNextSet = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          eventType: 'set_start',
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setNumber: matchState.currentSet + 1,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now()
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, newEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('success', `Inizio Set ${matchState.currentSet + 1}`);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleFinishMatch = async () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // Use a custom confirmation or just proceed for now to unblock
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // if (confirm('Confermi di voler terminare la partita?')) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setLoading(true);
pages/Scouting.tsx:          try {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              // 1. Update Match Status
pages/Scouting.tsx:              const finalScore = `${matchState.setsWonUs}-${matchState.setsWonThem}`;
pages/Scouting.tsx:              await updateMatch({
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  ...match,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  status: 'completed',
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  result: finalScore
pages/Scouting.tsx:              });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:              // 2. Calculate & Update Player Ratings
pages/Scouting.tsx:              const playerStats = new Map<string, GameEvent[]>();
pages/Scouting.tsx:              eventLog.forEach(e => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  if (e.playerId) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      const list = playerStats.get(e.playerId) || [];
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      list.push(e);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      playerStats.set(e.playerId, list);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  }
pages/Scouting.tsx:              });
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:              const statsToSave: PlayerMatchStats[] = [];
pages/Scouting.tsx:              for (const [pid, events] of playerStats.entries()) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  const p = players.find(x => x.id === pid);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  if (p) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      const ratingResult = computeVolleyRating(events, { role: p.position });
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      let attacks = 0, attackPoints = 0, attackErrors = 0;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      let serves = 0, aces = 0, serveErrors = 0;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      let receptions = 0, perfectReceptions = 0, negativeReceptions = 0;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      let blocks = 0, blockPoints = 0, digs = 0;
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      for (const ev of events) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                        if (!ev.fundamental || !ev.outcome) continue;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                        switch (ev.fundamental) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          case Fundamental.ATTACK:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            attacks++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'attack_point' || ev.outcome === 'attack_tool') attackPoints++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'attack_error' || ev.outcome === 'attack_blocked') attackErrors++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            break;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          case Fundamental.SERVE:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            serves++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'serve_ace') aces++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'serve_error') serveErrors++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            break;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          case Fundamental.RECEPTION:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            receptions++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'reception_perfect') perfectReceptions++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'reception_negative' || ev.outcome === 'reception_ace_conceded' || ev.outcome === 'reception_slash') negativeReceptions++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            break;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          case Fundamental.BLOCK:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            blocks++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'block_point') blockPoints++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            break;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          case Fundamental.DEFENSE:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            if (ev.outcome === 'defense_great' || ev.outcome === 'defense_ok' || ev.outcome === 'defense_cover') digs++;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            break;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                        }
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      }
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      statsToSave.push({
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          id: `s_${match.id}_${pid}`,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          playerId: pid,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          teamId: match.teamId,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          rating: ratingResult.rating,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          breakdown: ratingResult.breakdown,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          totalPoints: attackPoints + aces + blockPoints,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          errors: attackErrors + serveErrors,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          matchDate: match.date,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          opponentName: match.opponentName,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          totals: {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                              attacks, attackPoints, attackErrors,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                              serves, aces, serveErrors,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                              receptions, perfectReceptions, negativeReceptions,
pages/Scouting.tsx:                              blocks, blockPoints, digs
pages/Scouting.tsx:                          }
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      });
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  }
pages/Scouting.tsx:              }
pages/Scouting.tsx:              
pages/Scouting.tsx:              if (statsToSave.length > 0) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  await savePlayerMatchStats(statsToSave);
pages/Scouting.tsx:              }
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:              showToast('success', 'Partita Terminata', `Risultato finale: ${finalScore}`);
pages/Scouting.tsx:              onFinished();
pages/Scouting.tsx:          } catch (e) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              console.error(e);
pages/Scouting.tsx:              showToast('error', 'Errore', 'Impossibile salvare i dati, ma chiudo comunque.');
pages/Scouting.tsx:              onFinished(); // Force close even on error
pages/Scouting.tsx:          } finally {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              setLoading(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:          }
pages/Scouting.tsx:      // }
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleManualScoreSubmit = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const adjustmentEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          eventType: 'manual_adjustment',
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setNumber: matchState.currentSet,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          adjustmentData: {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              newScoreTeam: manualScoreUs,
pages/Scouting.tsx:              newScoreOpponent: manualScoreThem
pages/Scouting.tsx:          }
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, adjustmentEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setShowScoreModal(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('info', 'Punteggio Aggiornato', `Nuovo punteggio: ${manualScoreUs}-${manualScoreThem}`);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleManualRotation = (steps: number) => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const rotationEvent: GameEvent = {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          id: generateId(),

pages/Scouting.tsx:          eventType: 'rotation_update',
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setNumber: matchState.currentSet,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          adjustmentData: {
pages/Scouting.tsx:              rotationSteps: steps
pages/Scouting.tsx:          }
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, rotationEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('info', 'Rotazione Aggiornata', steps > 0 ? 'Avanti (+1)' : 'Indietro (-1)');
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const handleRestartSet = () => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!match || !matchState) return;
pages/Scouting.tsx:      if (!confirm('Sei sicuro di voler riavviare il set corrente? Tutti i punti di questo set verranno azzerati.')) return;

pages/Scouting.tsx:          id: generateId(),
pages/Scouting.tsx:          matchId: match.id,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          eventType: 'set_start',
pages/Scouting.tsx:          setNumber: matchState.currentSet,
pages/Scouting.tsx:          timestamp: Date.now()
pages/Scouting.tsx:      };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      const newLog = eventStore.appendEvent(matchId, restartEvent);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setEventLog(newLog);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      setShowTools(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:      showToast('info', 'Set Riavviato', `Set ${matchState.currentSet} ricominciato.`);
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  // --- RENDER HELPERS ---
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  if (loading || !matchState || !match) return <div className="h-screen flex items-center justify-center font-display text-4xl animate-pulse">CARICAMENTO CAMPO...</div>;
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const getGridArea = (pos: CourtPosition) => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:      switch(pos) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 4: return 'row-start-1 col-start-1';
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 3: return 'row-start-1 col-start-2';
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 2: return 'row-start-1 col-start-3';
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 5: return 'row-start-2 col-start-1';
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 6: return 'row-start-2 col-start-2';
pages/Scouting.tsx:          case 1: return 'row-start-2 col-start-3';
pages/Scouting.tsx:      }
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  const isActionAllowed = (player: Player, fundamental: Fundamental, courtPos: CourtPosition): boolean => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:    if (player.position === PlayerPosition.LIBERO) {
pages/Scouting.tsx:        if (fundamental === Fundamental.SERVE) return false;
pages/Scouting.tsx:        if (fundamental === Fundamental.BLOCK) return false;
pages/Scouting.tsx:        if (fundamental === Fundamental.ATTACK && [2,3,4].includes(courtPos)) return false;
pages/Scouting.tsx:    }
pages/Scouting.tsx:    return true;
pages/Scouting.tsx:  };
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:  return (
pages/Scouting.tsx:    <div className="h-[calc(100vh-80px)] flex flex-col font-sans overflow-hidden bg-cream-light">
pages/Scouting.tsx:      
pages/Scouting.tsx:      {/* SCOREBOARD HEADER */}
pages/Scouting.tsx:      <div className="bg-navy text-cream p-4 flex justify-between items-center shadow-lg z-10">

pages/Scouting.tsx:                </div>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                     START SET {matchState.currentSet + 1}
pages/Scouting.tsx:                 </Button>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                 <Button variant="danger" size="sm" onClick={handleFinishMatch}>FINISCI</Button>
pages/Scouting.tsx:             )}
pages/Scouting.tsx:         </div>
pages/Scouting.tsx:      </div>
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-1 min-h-0 gap-4 p-4">
pages/Scouting.tsx:         
pages/Scouting.tsx:         {/* LEFT: COURT */}
pages/Scouting.tsx:         <div className="w-full md:w-[45%] flex flex-col gap-4">
pages/Scouting.tsx:             <div className="relative bg-orange-100 border-4 border-terracotta rounded-lg shadow-inner flex-1 min-h-[400px]">
pages/Scouting.tsx:                 {/* 3-meter line */}
pages/Scouting.tsx:                 <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-terracotta/40 z-0"></div>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                         if (!player) return null;
pages/Scouting.tsx:                         const isSelected = selectedPlayerId === slot.playerId;

pages/Scouting.tsx:

pages/Scouting.tsx:

pages/Scouting.tsx:                                ${disabled ? 'opacity-30 cursor-not-allowed bg-gray-100 shadow-none' : ''}

pages/Scouting.tsx:                        </button>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                 })}

pages/Scouting.tsx:                                    ${selectedOutcome === outcome.code ? 'ring-4 ring-black scale-95' : 'shadow-sm hover:translate-y-[-2px]'}
pages/Scouting.tsx:                                `}
pages/Scouting.tsx:                            >
pages/Scouting.tsx:                                <span className="font-bold text-sm leading-none mb-1">{outcome.label}</span>
pages/Scouting.tsx:                                <span className="font-mono text-xs opacity-70">{outcome.symbol}</span>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                ) : (

pages/Scouting.tsx:                )}
pages/Scouting.tsx:             </div>

pages/Scouting.tsx:                 REGISTRA EVENTO
pages/Scouting.tsx:             </Button>
pages/Scouting.tsx:         </div>
pages/Scouting.tsx:      </div>
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:      {/* TOOLS MODAL */}
pages/Scouting.tsx:      {showTools && (
pages/Scouting.tsx:          <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
pages/Scouting.tsx:              <div className="bg-white border-4 border-black rounded-card shadow-cartoon p-6 max-w-sm w-full space-y-4">
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  <h3 className="font-display text-3xl mb-4">STRUMENTI</h3>
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  <Button className="w-full" onClick={() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setManualScoreUs(matchState.teamPoints);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setManualScoreThem(matchState.opponentPoints);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setShowScoreModal(true);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setShowTools(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  }}>
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      📝 Correggi Punteggio
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  </Button>
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  <Button className="w-full" variant="secondary" onClick={() => {
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setShowLiveStats(true);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      setShowTools(false);
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  }}>
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      📊 Statistiche Live
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  </Button>
pages/Scouting.tsx:
pages/Scouting.tsx:                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
pages/Scouting.tsx:                      <Button variant="secondary" onClick={() => handleManualRotation(-1)}>

services/dbService.ts:export const generateId = (): string => {

services/dbService.ts:    return crypto.randomUUID();
services/dbService.ts:  }
