services/dbService.ts:// --- LOCAL STORAGE HELPERS ---
services/dbService.ts:const getStorage = <T>(key: string, defaultData: T[]): T[] => {
services/dbService.ts:  const data = localStorage.getItem(`volleyrank_${key}`);
services/dbService.ts:  if (!data) {
services/dbService.ts:    localStorage.setItem(`volleyrank_${key}`, JSON.stringify(defaultData));
services/dbService.ts:    return defaultData;
services/dbService.ts:  }
services/dbService.ts:  try {
services/dbService.ts:    const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
services/dbService.ts:    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
services/dbService.ts:      localStorage.setItem(`volleyrank_${key}`, JSON.stringify(defaultData));
services/dbService.ts:      return defaultData;
services/dbService.ts:    }
services/dbService.ts:    // Force load mock data if the array is empty (useful for prototype recovery)
services/dbService.ts:    if (parsed.length === 0 && Array.isArray(defaultData) && defaultData.length > 0) {
services/dbService.ts:        localStorage.setItem(`volleyrank_${key}`, JSON.stringify(defaultData));
services/dbService.ts:        return defaultData;
services/dbService.ts:    }
services/dbService.ts:    return parsed;
services/dbService.ts:  } catch (e) {
services/dbService.ts:    console.error(`Error parsing localStorage key volleyrank_${key}`, e);
services/dbService.ts:    localStorage.setItem(`volleyrank_${key}`, JSON.stringify(defaultData));
services/dbService.ts:    return defaultData;
services/dbService.ts:  }
services/dbService.ts:};

App.tsx:const App: React.FC = () => {
App.tsx:  const [route, setRoute] = useState<string>(window.location.hash.slice(1) || '/');
App.tsx:  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);
App.tsx:  const [isAuthReady, setIsAuthReady] = useState(false);
App.tsx:  
App.tsx:  // Toast State
App.tsx:  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<ToastMessage[]>([]);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    const checkAuth = async () => {
App.tsx:      const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('volleyrank_user');
App.tsx:      if (storedUser) {
App.tsx:        try {
App.tsx:          setUser(JSON.parse(storedUser));
App.tsx:        } catch (e) {
App.tsx:          console.error("Invalid user data in localStorage", e);
App.tsx:          localStorage.removeItem('volleyrank_user');
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:      setIsAuthReady(true);
App.tsx:    };
App.tsx:

App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:

App.tsx:    const handleHashChange = () => setRoute(window.location.hash.slice(1) || '/');
App.tsx:    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange);
App.tsx:    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange);
App.tsx:  }, []);

App.tsx:  }, []);

App.tsx:    const id = Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
App.tsx:    setToasts((prev) => [...prev, { id, type, title, message }]);
App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  const removeToast = useCallback((id: string) => {
App.tsx:    setToasts((prev) => prev.filter((t) => t.id !== id));

App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // --- Router Logic ---
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  const renderContent = () => {
App.tsx:    if (!user) return <LandingPage />;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    // Handle dynamic routes
App.tsx:    if (route.startsWith('/players/')) {
App.tsx:        const playerId = route.split('/')[2];
App.tsx:        return <PlayerProfile user={user} playerId={playerId} onNavigate={navigate} />;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:    
App.tsx:    if (route.startsWith('/scout/')) {
App.tsx:        const matchId = route.split('/')[2];
App.tsx:        return <Scouting 
App.tsx:            matchId={matchId} 
App.tsx:            user={user} 
App.tsx:            onFinished={() => navigate('/dashboard')} 
App.tsx:            showToast={addToast}
App.tsx:        />;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    switch (route) {
App.tsx:      case '/dashboard':
App.tsx:        return <Dashboard user={user} onNavigate={navigate} />;
App.tsx:      case '/teams':
App.tsx:        return <Teams user={user} showToast={addToast} onNavigate={navigate} />;
App.tsx:      case '/leaderboards':
App.tsx:        return <Leaderboard user={user} />;
App.tsx:      default:
App.tsx:        return <Dashboard user={user} onNavigate={navigate} />;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:  };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  return (
App.tsx:    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
App.tsx:      <Layout 
App.tsx:        user={user} 
App.tsx:        onLogout={handleLogout} 
App.tsx:        currentPath={route} 
App.tsx:        onNavigate={navigate}
App.tsx:      >
App.tsx:        {renderContent()}
App.tsx:      </Layout>
App.tsx:      
App.tsx:      <ToastContainer toasts={toasts} removeToast={removeToast} />
App.tsx:      
App.tsx:      {/* Dev Tool: Reset Data */}
App.tsx:      <div className="fixed bottom-2 right-2 opacity-20 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
App.tsx:          <button onClick={handleResetData} className="text-[10px] bg-red-500 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded">
App.tsx:              Reset Data
App.tsx:          </button>
App.tsx:      </div>
App.tsx:    </div>
App.tsx:  );
App.tsx:};
App.tsx:
App.tsx:export default App;
